Name: CERATIZIT
Description:
CERATIZIT - Tooling a Sustainable Future
For over 100 years, we have been developing and producing sophisticated hard material cutting and wear protection solutions: From highly specialized cutting tools, indexable inserts and carbide rods to new types of carbide and cermet grades for wood and stone working. The constant innovation of materials and applications helps us and our customers to create a large number of machines, tools, applications, and consumer goods which shape our immediate environment and are part of our everyday life.

Name: Plansee
Description:
Plansee –  Your innovation partner for high-performance materials

Plansee is a world-leading manufacturer of components made from molybdenum and tungsten. Wherever conventional metals reach their limits our refractory metals and composite materials deliver unmatched performance, precision, and durability.

As an innovation partner, we work closely with our customers to develop sustainable, forward-thinking solutions that push the boundaries of what is technologically possible. Our materials power progress in industries like consumer electronics, automotive, medical technology, and aerospace—making the world more efficient, safer, and better to live in.

Founded in 1921 in Reutte, Austria, Plansee has grown into a truly global company with operations in 28 countries and 12 production sites across Europe, the USA, and Asia.

Careers at Plansee – Shape the Future with Us
At Plansee, we believe that innovation starts with people. That’s why we offer exciting career opportunities in engineering, research & development, production, IT, marketing, and more. Whether you're just starting out or looking to take the next step in your career, you'll find a supportive, international environment where your ideas matter and your growth is encouraged.

Join us and become part of a team that’s shaping the technologies of tomorrow—with curiosity, collaboration, and a passion for materials that make a difference.

Name: FICEP S.p.A.
Description:
Headquartered in Varese, Italy, Ficep is the leading manufacturer of machine tools for the steel construction fabrication industry with customers in nearly 90 countries globally. The company has the world's widest range of machines for both the forging and structural steel industries.

Ficep S.p.A. was founded by the family of the present owners in 1930. For over 95 years the company has grown from a manufacturer of manual machines to be the leader of the most advanced CNC machine tool technologies in the steel construction Industry.

Name: UNITED GRINDING
Description:
UNITED GRINDING is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of grinding, eroding, laser, and measuring machines as well as machine tools for additive manufacturing. With roughly 2.300 employees at more than 20 manufacturing, service, and sales locations, the division is organized in a customer-oriented and efficient way.
Through its MÄGERLE, BLOHM, JUNG, STUDER, SCHAUDT, MIKROSA, WALTER, EWAG, and IRPD brands, as well as competence centers in America and Asia, UNITED GRINDING offers broad application expertise, a large product portfolio, and a full range of services for the production of highprecision components.
The tradition of the group companies goes back more than one hundred years, during which more than 150,000 machines were manufactured and delivered throughout the world. This longstand-ing experience and broad technological expertise make UNITED GRINDING a reliable and competent solution provider for complex manufacturing tasks. 
The innovative technologies of the companies of UNITED GRINDING have a broad range of applications, from single part production through to mass production, from small businesses to large corporations, and are used in a wide variety of industries. Key areas are the automotive and supplier industry, medical, aerospace industry, tooling, die and mold, transportation and heavy industry, machine manufacturers, energy and precision engineering. 
Our top priority in all that we do is to contribute to our customers' success.

Name: C. & E. Fein GmbH
Description:
FEIN ist bekannt als international agierendes Unternehmen mit Firmensitz in Deutschland. Die Marke steht für qualitativ hochwertige Elektrowerkzeuge und Zubehöre für harte Arbeitseinsätze in Industrie und Handwerk. Den Fokus legt FEIN auf Produkte und Services, die ideale Problemlöser in der Metallbearbeitung, im Bereich Ausbau sowie für prozesssichere Serienverschrauben sind. Die Produkte werden international vermarktet. Zentrale Absatzmärkte sind Europa, Nordamerika und Asien.

1867 gründete Wilhelm Emil Fein die Firma als mechanische Werkstatt, die in den Anfangsjahren erfolgreich elektrische Apparate und Anlagen entwickelte und fertigte. Mit der Erfindung der elektrischen Handbohrmaschine im Jahr 1895 – dem ersten Elektrowerkzeug der Welt – war der Grundstein gelegt für die Spezialisierung der Firma. Auf diesem Sektor folgten zahlreiche Weiterentwicklungen. Eine bedeutende Entwicklung brachte FEIN 1967 mit dem ersten oszillierenden Elektrowerkzeug auf den Markt. Noch heute, über 50 Jahre später, setzen Profis weltweit auf dieses Multifunktionswerkzeug mit dem Namen MULTIMASTER. 

Als unabhängiges Familienunternehmen lebt FEIN eine offene Unternehmenskultur, legt einen hohen Wert auf ein menschliches Miteinander und bietet viel Raum für innovative Ideen. Am Firmensitz in Schwäbisch Gmünd-Bargau befindet sich neben der Produktentwicklung auch der größte Produktionsstandort. International fertigt FEIN mit denselben Qualitätsstandards in den USA und in Indien.

Rund 800 Mitarbeiter arbeiten weltweit mit viel Erfindergeist und einem hohen Maß an Servicebereitschaft daran, auch in Zukunft Meilensteine in der Entwicklung erstklassiger Elektrowerkzeug-Systeme zu setzen. Genau darin ist FEIN Profi – und das seit über 150 Jahren.

Name: Precision Cutting Tools
Description:
Precision Cutting Tools Inc. was founded in 1963 and ever since has specialized in the production of high-quality cutting tools. We manufacture all of our products in La Palma CA. Today, with over sixty years of experience, PCT is a leading cutting tool manufacturer that distributes its products all across North America and Europe. We base our company’s success on our long-standing commitment to satisfy our customers’ needs, by utilizing the finest raw materials, introducing innovative cutting tools and providing excellent customer service. 

-- In May 2018, Precision Cutting Tools was proud to announce that it had become a member of the IMC Group. In a partnership between the Sheth Family and the IMC Group, Precision Cutting Tools continues to operate as an independent brand, with our own products and distributor network.

-- In 2021, PCT moved its operations to a 60,000 square foot facility in La Palma, CA. This has allowed us to expand our capacity and continue to dedicate ourselves to our core competency of having the best-in-industry delivery on special, high-quality, solid end mills and long drills.

Our mission is to satisfy and fulfill the needs of our customers by offering a high performance, high quality tool at a fair price, with the quickest turnaround time in the industry. Through increasing capacity and capabilities by investing in machinery and people, we continue to grow sales while maintaining our delivery times. 

We want the PCT brand to be known for having the quality and performance that you expect from large tool manufacturers, but offer our customers the turnaround time and customer service you expect from a family run company. 

Cutting Tools  
•	End Mills (High Performance)
•	Drills (up to 50xD standard)
•	Specials-Per-Print (5-7 day turnaround standard)

Industries 
•	Aerospace
•	Automotive
•	Mold & Die
•	Medical
•	Oil Drilling

Dünyanın önde gelen takım tezgâhı üreticilerinin temsilciliğini üstlenen firmamız, talaşlı imalat makinaları satışı ve satış sonrası destek konularında çalıştığı tüm müşterilerine uzun soluklu ve müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutan hizmet vermeyi kendisine ilke edinmiştir.

Sektöründe ISO 9001 sertifikası alan ilk firmadır.

MEGA, bilgi birikimini Türkiye sınırları içerisinde bırakmayıp Romanya’da kurduğu RO-MEGA Trade S.R.L şirketi aracılığı ile bu bölgenin de temsilciliğini alarak büyümesini yurt dışına taşımıştır. Firmamızın satış ve servis grubunda görev yapan personelimiz, firma içinde ve yurtdışında düzenlenen çeşitli kurslara ve eğitim çalışmalarına düzenli olarak katılmakta, çalışma konularımız hakkında bilgi ve deneyimlerini sürekli güncellemektedir. Name: Dyson Corporation
Description:
For over 125 years, Dyson Corp. has supplied domestic fasteners, forgings and machined parts to America’s transportation infrastructure of bridges, railroads and waterways, the fossil fuel industries of mining and power generation, shipbuilding and nuclear power, and the OEM supply chain.  

Beginning in 1884, as a specialty forge shop in Cleveland, founder Joseph Dyson started to produce small forgings for various industries. Responding to customer demand, Dyson Corp. soon developed the capability to manufacture larger fasteners and forgings, as well as fork arms for the material handling industry.  

Today, forgings made at the Painesville, Ohio plant range in size from 1/2 to 10,000 pounds. Equipment includes a combination of hammers, mechanical and hydraulic presses, upsetters, benders, and state-of-the-art hot part formers with in-line heat treating. In addition, the company’s extensive CNC turning and milling operations, and the considerable thread rolling, drilling and tapping capability have helped Dyson develop into a premier critical fastener manufacturer. Working in product diameters from 1-1/2" to 8", Dyson is producing fasteners to various specifications, including ASME, MIL, ANSI, and DIN, and servicing critical component markets, such as military product and nuclear power.

Name: SIFCO
Description:
A SIFCO S.A foi uma das maiores indústrias metalúrgicas brasileiras com matriz em Jundiaí-SP e filial em Campinas-SP. 

Fundada em 1958 a partir da associação da família do Barão Smith de Vasconcellos com as multinacionais norte-americanas Steel Improvemente and Forge Co. e American Brake Shoe, a empresa tornou-se uma das principais forjarias pesadas do mundo. Por muitos anos ocupou a liderança de seu segmento no país. Entre seus principais produtos estão o eixo dianteiro de veículos pesados e elos de máquinas agrícolas. 

A SIFCO se tornou uma das principais fornecedoras de forjados para a Willys Overland, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Scania, Caterpillar, General Motors, Eaton Yale e Towne, entre outras. Na primeira década de operação da SIFCO o mercado automotivo brasileiro se expandiu 30.000 a 280.000 veículos produzidos anualmente. 

Em 2014 após grande crise do setor metalúrgico a empresa entrou com pedido de recuperação judicial e, em 2016, a multinacional DANA anunciou a aquisição dos ativos estratégicos da SIFCO, assumindo passivos econômicos, clientes e empregados.

Esta página foi criada por Flávio Domingues, Consultor Especialista de RH em 2012. Após a recuperação judicial, no ano de 2016, houve contato com a Dana para transferência da página, porém a empresa decidiu não administrar este conteúdo. Esta página tornou-se então um memorial para as mais de 25.000 pessoas que já trabalharam na SIFCO, antes da sua incorporação ao Grupo Dana.

Siga também @rhdiarioconsultoria aqui no Linkedin e acompanhe as novidades em Gestão de Pessoas.

Los constantes trabajos de investigación posibilitan el desarrollo tecnológico de los productos, optimizando así su capacidad de acción en todo tipo de exigencias para responder a las necesidades y condiciones más complejas. Produce diferentes tipos de bombas: centrífugas horizontales, monobloc, bombas para líquidos cloacales, autocebantes, multicelulares, electrobombas sumergibles y bombas turbina para pozo profundo. Los caudales llegan hasta 9.000 m3/hora y la altura manométrica hasta 250 metros. Los principales usos de las bombas son para abastecimiento de agua potable, servicio a la industria, a la agricultura, irrigación para distintos usos, edificios, plantas de agua cloacal, entre otras.La experiencia de más de ochenta años continuos que la firma tiene en la producción de equipos de bombeo la convierte en uno de los principales referentes del mercado argentino.

Name: Astron Specialty Metals

Manufacturing company specializes in Stainless Steel, Aluminum and other Metals.

When you require Custom Fabrication, we have the skill, the craftsmen and the equipment. For over 50 years, we’ve delivered on our reputation for top quality products made to precise specifications. A strong commitment to our customers is one of the foundations that our company was built on.

OUR HISTORY
Established in 1966 in a location consisting of approximately 5,000 square feet, the three partners that started the company also made up the entire staff.

Good work and long hours led to an expanding customer base and growing business success. Today, Astron remains a family-run business. Our facilities encompass over 30,000 square feet and our employees number over 40. We are very proud of our many longtime employees, several of whom have provided loyal service to Astron and our customers for over 30 years.

But some things will never change. The hands-on approach that made us thrive is still alive and well at Astron.

OUR COMMITMENT

When you look at a finished project from Astron, you’re looking at the commitment of 40 highly skilled craftsmen. From fabrication to welding to polishing, their expert abilities translate into product excellence every step of the way. From our base of operation in Waterloo, we custom fabricate for industries that deliver our products across North America and around the world.

- Innovation-Driven: From reducing lead times to solving supply chain challenges, we enable businesses to thrive in a fast-changing landscape.

Name: Artelon Makine
Description:
Artelon, Türkiye'nin sektördeki en büyük bilgi birikimine sahip Rack Kabinet ve Aksesuarı üreticisi Lande Kabinet firmasının resmi dağıtıcısı ve ortağıdır.

 Rack kabinetlerin yanında bayisi olduğumuz firmalar vasıtasıyla her türlü bakır ve fiber network ürünlerini de firmamızdan tedarik edebilirsiniz.

 Artelon aynı zamanda Türkiye’nin en büyük yerli askı aparatı üreticisidir. Her türlü ebattaki TV, monitör ve projeksiyon cihazlarınız için sabit ve hareketli duvar, masaüstü ve tavan askı aparatları üretmekteyiz. Üretici olmanın verdiği avantajla projelerinize ve isteklerinize uygun ölçülerde farklı ürün tasarımları ve üretimi de yapabilmekteyiz. Mevcut askı aparatı ürünlerimizde yüksek stok ve kalitemiz ile müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutmaktayız. Perpa’daki toptan showroom’umuzda tüm kabin ve aksesuarları, Askı Aparatı ürünleri, Patch Panel, RJ45 Keystone Jack, Bakır ve Fiber Data Kablo Çeşitleri, Bakır ve Fiber Patch Cord ve Pigtailleri, KVM Konsollarını ve Akım Korumalı PDU ile Akıllı PDU ürünlerini görebilirsiniz.

 Toptan satış ofisimizin bulunduğu Perpa 8.Katta bir de yeni faaliyete geçen perakende showroom’umuzda her türlü network ürünleri, kablo çeşitleri (HDMI, USB, DVI, Data, değişik metrajlarda patch cord vs), klavyeden modeme bilgisayar ürünleri, network altyapı işlerinde ihtiyaç duyduğunuz el aletlerini bulabilirsiniz.

 Artelon müşterilerine sorunsuz ürün temin etmek için uğraşır. Artelon ürünlerini tedarik etmek için satış temsilcileriyle irtibat kurabilir ya da yakında faaliyete geçecek Artelon'un online satış platformu üzerinden online şekilde satın alabilirsiniz.

Name: Haas Automation France
Description:
Haas Automation est le plus grand constructeur de machines-outils aux États-Unis et l'un des plus grands constructeurs de machines CNC au monde. Nous fabriquons une gamme complète de centres d'usinage à broche verticale CNC, de centres d'usinage à broche horizontale, de centres de tournage, de centres d'usinage 5 axes et de produits diviseurs, ainsi qu'une large sélection de solutions d'automatisation entièrement intégrées, notamment des chargeurs automatiques de pièces, des systèmes de magasin de palettes, et des systèmes robotiques à 6 axes. 

Les produits Haas sont fabriqués dans nos installations ultramodernes de près de 102 000 mètres carrés dans le sud de la Californie, et distribués via un réseau de plus de 170 magasins d'usine Haas, détenus et exploités localement, dans plus de 60 pays. Les magasins d'usine Haas (HFO) offrent les meilleures ventes, services et assistance dans l'industrie des machines-outils.

Name: Metal Utility
Description:
Metal Utility se especializa en la fabricación y maquinado de estructuras de acero. Esto significa que su actividad principal es transformar el acero en componentes y ensambles que se utilizan en diversas industrias.
Las actividades clave de Metal Utility incluirían:
 * Diseño y Planificación: Interpretación de planos técnicos o creación de diseños para estructuras de acero.
 * Corte y Formado: Utilización de maquinaria especializada para cortar, doblar y dar forma al acero según las especificaciones.
 * Soldadura: Unión de piezas de acero mediante técnicas de soldadura para crear estructuras robustas.
 * Maquinado: Procesos que implican la eliminación de material de una pieza de acero para lograr dimensiones y acabados precisos (por ejemplo, taladrado, fresado, torneado).
 * Ensamblaje: Unir los componentes individuales para formar la estructura final.
 * Acabados y Tratamientos: Aplicación de recubrimientos protectores, pintura u otros tratamientos para mejorar la durabilidad y apariencia del acero.
 * Control de Calidad: Inspecciones rigurosas en cada etapa para asegurar que las estructuras cumplan con los estándares de calidad y seguridad.
Las características que definen a Metal Utility probablemente serían:
 * Precisión: Un enfoque en la exactitud de las dimensiones y el acabado de las estructuras.
 * Durabilidad: Creación de productos que son resistentes y de larga vida útil.
 * Versatilidad: Capacidad para trabajar con diferentes tipos de acero y producir una amplia gama de estructuras.
 * Experiencia: Conocimiento técnico y práctico en los procesos de fabricación y maquinado.
 * Tecnología: Uso de maquinaria y herramientas avanzadas para optimizar la producción.
 * Seguridad: Cumplimiento de normas de seguridad en todos los procesos.
En resumen, Metal Utility es una empresa que toma el acero como materia prima y, a través de procesos de fabricación y maquinado avanzados, lo convierte en estructuras sólidas y precisas para diversas aplicaciones.

For foundries dealing with brake systems, we are able to design and manufacture, among other things:

-new tooling for the production of casting cores, the so-called Cold Box,
-any modifications to Cold Box tools, from changing markings to shape modifications or even adaptations to different types of production machines,
-new model assemblies made of steel and aluminum, both for discs and calipers, as well as caliper housings. Metal sets designed for mass production (for machine molding, mainly for the HANSBERG type),
-various modifications to model assemblies, from changing markings to shape modifications (adding or removing material),
-modifications and regeneration of core shooter bodies,
-new gripper assemblies for removing cores from core shooters during production,
-grading plates for brake disc cores,
-any spare parts: gas sleeves, shot sleeves, centering pins, centering bushings, etc.

Our experience and specialized machine park often contribute to cost savings for our clients.

As ferramentas de corte Diaedge são projetadas com precisão e fabricadas para proporcionar maior controle, facilidade de uso, implementação ágil, confiabilidade, repetibilidade e qualidade consistente.

No Brasil, a Mitsubishi Materials iniciou suas operações por meio de um distribuidor local. Em 1998, a empresa consolidou sua presença com a fundação da MMC METAL DO BRASIL LTDA, localizada em São Paulo. Desde então, a MMC METAL DO BRASIL tem se dedicado a oferecer as ferramentas de alta qualidade da Mitsubishi Materials (Diaedge) em todo o território nacional, por meio de uma ampla rede de distribuidores e representantes autorizados.

Com uma abordagem focada no cliente, a MMC METAL DO BRASIL busca desenvolver produtos e serviços sob medida para atender às necessidades do mercado brasileiro. Integrada à rede global da Mitsubishi Materials, a subsidiária brasileira contribui para fortalecer a manufatura mundial, promovendo soluções inovadoras e sustentáveis que agregam valor aos negócios de seus clientes.

Аддитивні технології для створення складних і високоточних деталей.

Description:

Nossa missão foi educar os nossos parceiros sobre o AÇO INOX, para que pudessem entender os tipos adequados para cada produto, mostrar que não é todo Inox que não enferruja mas sim determinadas ligas que tem essa propriedade de alta resistência a corrosão e que pudessem entender onde utilizá-lo. Treinamos profissionais para que pudessem realizar os serviços com inox, nossos profissionais são especializados, em corte, dobra, montagem e soldagem em inox.

Aos poucos nossos parceiros viram que o AÇO INOX não tem um custo alto, visto que seu custo beneficio é excelente por conta de não ter que realizar manutenções, ser elegante e ser duradouro, ele se tornou a matéria prima preferida de todos os parceiros. Com isso, aumentaram nossos clientes e nos consolidamos nesse mercado com a missão de sempre levar um produto em inox integro para todos nossos clientes. Trabalhamos com 3 Pilares em nossa empresa, ACABAMENTO, QUALIDADE e EXCELENTE ATENDIMENTO, isso nos proporcionou ser referencia nesse mercado. 

Fazemos produtos como Tanques com Batedores, Plataformas, Escadas, Corrimões e Guarda Corpos, Mesas, Pias Bancadas, Lava Botas... Estamos sempre a disposição para ajudar as empresas com suas necessidades.

Toolcraft has been supplying a wide variety of industries with Precision Tooling, Gaging and Fixturing since 1961.  With our experienced journeymen  Toolmakers, precision tooling is one of our specialties!  Many of our customers require .0001” tolerances on size, flatness, perpendicularity, parallelism, position and concentricity.

Toolcraft builds custom gages and measuring fixtures for a wide variety of applications.  From gaging with dial/digital indicators to semi-automatic and go/no-go gaging.  We will work closely with your engineers to ensure that your gaging checks and  controls critical dimensions.

Along with precision tooling, Toolcraft also has the capability to machine the not-so-critical tools at a very reasonable cost.  We can provide work holding fixtures, custom jaws and fabrications as well as refurbish your existing fixtures and gages.

Name: AP Precision Metals
Description:
They say the world is flat, but it still seems pretty wide. Despite technology, when the unforeseen arises, long-distance supply chains make it harder to change course. In unpredictable times, you need partners you can depend upon, resilient and consistent allies capable of withstanding uncertainty.

We founded AP Precision Metals to be a safe harbor in any storm. We’re battle-tested, and history-proven, ready for growth in any environment. Over twenty years of unprecedented challenges, our mettle has been tested time and again. We’re galvanized to provide reliability and peace of mind our clients can count on.

 We continually increase capacity for the high-volume manufacture of complex weldments, always investing in the most advanced tooling to meet ever-evolving demands. We are laser-focused on responsive communication, really getting to know you and your business so that we’re ready for whatever you might face. Whether it’s for those moments of turbulence, or unexpected growth.

Name: Hailiang Morocco Enterprise

The company’s business scope includes investment, construction, equipment and plant leasing, production, processing and sales of metal products, new energy battery materials, trade, import/export, subsidiary management, consulting, and property services.

HAILIANG Morocco Enterprise specializes in high-quality copper ingots, copper pipes, precision brass rods, copper alloys, and advanced lithium battery materials, widely used in air-conditioning, refrigeration, new energy systems, and various industrial and electronic components.

Fra vores moderne faciliteter i Levring ved Kjellerup rådgiver, udvikler, designer og fremstiller vi komponenter og nøglefærdige løsninger, der matcher kundernes behov. Fra ide til færdig løsning - og til kunder i både ind- og udland.

Vores sortiment inkluderer alle typer af transportruller - fra stålruller, plastruller, og gummibelagte ruller, til specialruller med påsvejste kædehjul og rullerelaterede komponenter.

Desuden fremstiller vi valser og tromler i stort set alle størrelser, herunder drivvalser, trækvalser, vendetromler og løstromler. Vi tilbyder både standard og skræddersyede løsninger, alt efter kundens specifikke behov.

Transportruller og tromler

Skanroll er kendt for vores høje kvalitet og korte leveringstider. Som en ordreproducerende virksomhed er vi altid klar til at tage imod nye udfordringer og hjælpe vores kunder med at finde den rette løsning.

Vores motto: Vi gør det lettere for vores kunder…

Name: Evans Machine Co, Inc
Description:

Our Machining Services include CNC milling, turning, grinding, wire EDM, welding & more. Our Value Added Services include clean room assembly & packaging, engineering support, and stockkeeping & inventory management.

Our Brand Promise – “More than Parts: Partnership.”

We believe manufacturers succeed when they can focus on their core mission, backed by a world-class outsourcing partner that understands their business.

Founded in 1968, EMI is the manufacturing outsourcing partner for companies looking for the right relationship. EMI delivers on five key dimensions:
1.	Manufacturing Capabilities Mix
2.	Complex Problem-Solving Capabilities
3.	On-Time Production
4.	Communications
5.	Customer Service Mindset

We are best suited to partner with companies pursuing these Manufacturing Strategies:
•	Engineer to Order – Custom work & fast turn prototyping; single/small production volumes
•	Make to Order – Batch production; low volumes
•	Make to Assemble – Episodic or repetitive production; medium/high volumes

EMI is not well-suited to serve firms that Make to Stock in high/ultra-high volumes via continuous production.

EMI serves numerous industry verticals:
•	Advanced Manufacturers
•	Defense
•	Food Processing & Packaging
•	Scientific Instruments, Testing & Metrology
•	Marine & Oceanographic
•	Medical & Life Sciences
•	Motion Control & Automation
•	Optical Instruments & Photonics
•	Production & Packaging Machinery

We are ISO 9001:2015 certified and ITAR registered.

Name: Integrity Metal Solutions
Description:
Aircare Engineering was started in 1974 in Leura in the Blue Mountains as a small family business for Doug Rendell, doing installation and service on air-conditioning and oil heating units and furnaces. Several months later, Doug decided to pursue his true calling of metal fabrication but the business name remained.

In 2003, the business moved to Young where it continued as a family business with Doug and his son Bill, continuing to offer the same metal fabrication and industrial supplies as we had done in the Blue Mountains. Finally, in 2020 the name was changed to Integrity Metal Solutions, to better reflect who we are, and what we do. We are continually expanding the services we offer as we acquire new equipment and carry out training in different areas.

Name: JJ MECHATRONIC A/S
Description:
JJ MECHATRONIC A/S
JJ Mechatronic, which originally started out as a passive electronic component supplier, was founded in 1969 by Electronics Engineer Jørgen Jensen. In order to meet an increased demand for solutions in mechanical and apparatus engineering on the Danish market, JJ Mechatronics started manufacturing mechanical solutions and establishing a supplier network.
As subcontractor for the B2B market, JJ Mechatronic primarily works for customers who market private-label products. As a matter of course client data is treated in strict confidence.
Today JJ Mechatronic A/S occupies 3000 m2 of warehousing, production and administration space. The company is based in Jyderup in West Zealand between Holbaek and Kalundborg and currently employs 30 workers.

JJ MECHATRONIC’s range of products

Solutions for Mechanical and Apparatus Engineering
We deliver cabinets and complete solutions in mechanical engineering for our clients and assist our clients in construction based on parameters such as EMC, cooling, density sizes and so forth. Read more about our different solutions for mechanics engineering at https://jjas.dk/produkter-loesninger/mekanik-loesninger/

Alu Profile System
In 1987 we started selling alu profile systems in Denmark from Kanya AG in Switzerland. Therefore, we have more than 25 years of experience in building shieldings, engine frames and providing different alu profile solutions. Read more about the advantages of the Kanya alu profile system at https://jjas.dk/produkter-loesninger/profilsystem/

Apparatus Construction
We have in depth experience and knowledge of apparatus design, apparatus construction and production.   Read more about apparatus construction at https://jjas.dk/produkter-loesninger/apparatkonstruktion/

Commercial Products
Apart from being a subcontractor we sell peripheral components and components that support apparatus construction. Read more about our commercial products at https://jjas.dk/produkter-loesninger/handelsvarer/.

Sheet Metal Processing
We provide many different sheet metal options in flexible series sizes. Our sheet metal products range from simple to diverse solutions consisting of many different parts. Read more about our sheet metal processing services at https://jjas.dk/ydelser/tyndpladebearbejdning/

CNC-milling
We provide a wide range of CNC-milling options in flexible series sizes. Our CNC-milling services range from simple 3-axis CNC-milling components to diverse solutions involving 5-axis processing with many different parts. We also offer complete solutions involving our sheet metal, painting and power assembly departments. Read more about CNC-milling at https://jjas.dk/ydelser/cnc-fraesning/

Industrial Powder- and Wet Enameling
In our department for industrial powder- and wet enameling we paint many different mate-rials/items in flexible series sizes. We have cabinets for industrial powder enameling and equipment for wet enameling with conveyor lines. Read more about industrial powder and wet enameling at https://jjas.dk/ydelser/pulverlakering/

ESD/Electronics Assembly
We offer electronics assembly in both ESD-secured and non-ESD-secured environments enabling us to box-build apparatus and handle prints in a safe manner.  Read more about ESD/electronics assembly at https://jjas.dk/ydelser/esd-mekanik-montage/

We always follow through on assignments
Our starting point remains that we are not satisfied until our clients have approved of the result. Consequently, we always endeavor to meet the expectations of our clients before starting a new assignment.

Ana hedefimiz, CNC makinelerindeki dışa bağımlılığı azaltarak ülkemize katkıda bulunmaktır. Bu doğrultuda, Cielon CNC olarak çalışmalarımıza aralıksız devam ediyoruz.

Name: Parsan Metal
Description:
Fason üretim teknolojinin ve hızın hâkim olduğu üretim pazarında firmalara birçok avantaj sunmaktadır. Fason üretim işletmelerin üretim kapasitelerini arttırmalarını, kendilerini üretemediği ya da üretim maliyetlerini düşüremeyecekleri yeni ürünler elde etmelerini sağlayan bir dış kaynak kullanımı biçimidir. Müşterilerimiz aynı zamanda pahalı sermayeyi üretim ekipmanlarına yatırmaktan ve kalifiyeli işçilik yapmaktan ziyade üretimi dışa aktararak bir maliyet avantajı elde edebilir. Ürünlere artan talep doğrultusunda, tesise yatırım yapmadan kısa vadeli talebi karşılamak için ek üretim kapasitesi ihtiyacı bu yolla karşılanabilir. Yeni ürünler geliştiren şirketler, tam ölçekli üretim tesislerini kurmadan önce test pazarlaması için pilot üretimler yapmak için sözleşmeli üreticileri kullanabilirler. Ayrıca, müşterilerimiz kendi kaynaklarıyla üretemeyecekleri bileşenlerin kalitesini veya performansını fason üretim vasıtasıyla AR-GE yaparak artırabilirler.

Çözüm ortağı olarak Parsan Metal, gizliliğinize önem verir ve ürünlerin kalite sürecinde kendi içinde kurduğu kalite sisteminin yanı sıra Kalite Kontrolde uzman üçüncü taraf denetçileri ile birlikte çalışarak kendini de sistemini kontrol etmektedir.

2012 yılında sektöre ilk adımlarını atan Parsan Metal, müşteri ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşımıyla fason üretimde kalitenin merkezi haline gelmeyi hedeflemektedir.

Geniş uygulama alanı sebebiyle makine, araç üstü ekipman, elektrik panosu, medikal ve tıbbi cihaz imalatı, sanayi tipi buzdolabı üretimi, klima, inşaat, aydınlatma, reklam ve tabela gibi birçok sektöre hizmet veren kuruluşumuz, bu yelpazeyi daha da genişleterek tecrübesini yeni alanlara aktarmaktadır.

Üretimde kullanılan son teknoloji makine parkuru ile günümüz koşullarının ihtiyacı olan hız, hassasiyet, kaliteli üretim sağlanmakta olup, gelişen pazarın değişen taleplerini karşılamak için sürekli kendisini geliştirmektedir.

3500 m2 si kapalı, toplam 6000 m2 lik üretim tesislerimizde bugün yılda 6500 ton işliyoruz.

ABOUT US 
The story of Devin begins with the technical dreams of two young individuals. Founders Tom Li and Jack Sun were college classmates and both deeply passionate about technology. After graduation, they ventured to Shenzhen to work as mechanical engineers. In 2008, they made the decision to return to their hometown of Hefei and together established a Machining factory.

Initially, their services were relatively singular, focusing on providing customized mechanical parts to clients. With exceptional technical expertise and outstanding service quality, the company garnered a loyal clientele.

As customer demands increased, the company gradually expanded its service offerings from custom mechanical parts to encompassing fields such as design, assembly, casting, and injection molding. This transformation was aimed at better meeting the needs of clients and further solidifying their market position.

To ensure stable casting and injection molding services, the founders integrated numerous high-quality casting and injection molding factories. They subsequently acquired stakes in two of these factories in 2013 and 2016, further enhancing the company's service capabilities and competitive advantage. Since then, the company's service portfolio has become more comprehensive, providing customers with even more refined solutions.

Description:
AKAD was established by our founder Eli Cohen more than two decades ago in Israel. From the beginning we dedicated ourselves to designing and creating state of the art dies in-house with the best materials to achieve the most cost-effective result for our customers. 
Our passion for our work has meant that AKAD has steadily grown to now command 95% of the industry market share in Israel. The secret to our success has been listening and understanding our clients’ needs and creating dies and tools made to perfection. AKAD is a small family business and we regard our clients as members of our  extended family. We pride ourselves on our loyal client base which features long standing customers that have been with us since we opened our doors.

PROGRESSIVE DIES

We design and manufacture dies for various industries, including medical equipment, air conditioning, automotive, and aeronautical businesses. 

AKAD’s progressive die designs repeatedly increase our clients’ productivity by enabling several tasks in their production lines to be executed consecutively from original material to final stage. 

Every AKAD die is made in-house and is easy to assemble and disassemble for fast and easy maintenance and repairs.
 
Our four-step process:

Each process begins with a preliminary meeting in which we learn about our client’s needs. 
We then proceed to design their ultimate product, customised to meet all of their needs. 
Once approved, we set out to manufacture the perfect dies, using high-quality materials that guarantee long-lasting use. 
The client then receives a top-notch die and a product file.
 
All of our products are eligible for door-to-door pickup and delivery.

Our dies can be used with any type of metal, including stainless steel, steel and aluminum. The maximum length we are able to create is 1800mm, multi station.

Name: Zhejiang Yinyao Stainless Steel Co.ltd
Description:
At China Stainless Steel Pipe Group, our mission is to deliver high-performance materials to the global industrial sector. We specialize in providing our clients with comprehensive services, including the design and selection of stainless steel and special alloy materials, optimization of material properties, microstructure, and composition, and expert guidance on material selection.

Our extensive production capabilities cover a wide range of products, including stainless steel seamless pipes, welded pipes, fittings, and flanges. We manufacture seamless pipes in sizes ranging from 1/8 inch to 48 inches and welded pipes from 1/2 inch to 120 inches. Our fittings and flanges are available in various sizes, meeting the diverse needs of our clients. All our products are manufactured in accordance with international standards such as ASTM, ASME, DIN, JIS, and EN, ensuring top-notch quality and reliability.

We utilize advanced production processes, including hot extrusion/perforation combined with cold rolling/cold drawing for seamless pipes, and FFX forming and JCO forming techniques for welded pipes. Our capabilities also extend to mechanical metallurgy composite pipe manufacturing, as well as product prefabrication and on-site installation services.

With a robust quality assurance system in place, China Stainless Steel Pipe Group, along with our core enterprise, Jiuli Special Material Co., Ltd., has been awarded the Special Equipment Manufacturing License by the General Administration of Quality Supervision, Inspection, and Quarantine of the People's Republic of China. Additionally, we have received multiple certifications from renowned classification societies, including CCS (China), GL (Germany), DNV (Norway), BV (France), LR (United Kingdom), and ABS (United States).

Description: Harbro Engineering has 35 years of engineering expertise and our experienced team prides itself in meeting the specific needs of our clients. Our dedication to providing quality, honest and reliable service, with innovative solutions has enabled us to keep ahead in our industry and we are keen to work alongside any business to help bring their production concepts to reality.

Name: ORLIKON HIDRAULIKA
Description:
ORLIKON HIDRAULIKA je porodična firma koja je osnovana 1996 godine kao samostalna zanatska radnja za razne mašinske usluge u svim oblastima, a naročito u oblasti hidraulike. Tokom niza uspešnih godina rada, Orlikon vodjen kvalitetom i stručnim kadrom, prelazi u proizvodnju i odgovara zahtevu tržišta što se tiče kompletne proizvodnje hidrauličkih agregata i sistema.

ORLIKON HIDRAULIKA se bavi izradom dokumentacije hidrauličkih cilindara , vrši proizvodnju i remont cilindara svih dimenzija, tipova i namena od poljoprivrednih mašina preko gradjevinske mehanizacije pa i za razna industrijska postrojenja i sisteme. 
Ono po čemu smo prepoznatljivi su proizvodnja i remont:
-hidrauličkih cilindara
-agregata i sistema

Što se tiče agregata i sistema možemo ih proizvesti po zahtevu kupaca za bilo koju namenu.Velikih ili malih protoka, raznih tipova komandovanja i raznih pritisaka...

Uz sve ovo firma Orlikon proizvodi i hidrauličke prese, namena od radioničkih pa do alatnih u zavisnosti od zahteva kupaca...

Lager
Pošto se bavimo proizvodnjom i remontom cilindara 2007. godine smo, kao direktni uvoznici, napravili lager materijala za nasu proizvodnju, a i za dalju prodaju. 
Naš lager sadrži:
-hidrauličke cevi raznih dimenzija
-hidrauličke klipnjace raznih dimenzija i tvrdoće
-uške sa zavarivanje i šrafljenje sa sfernim ležajevima
-zaptivni materijal i ostalo

ORLIKON ide korak dalje!
2021.godine u Trsteniku srcu hidraulike, zbog potreba svojih kupaca otvoren je maloprodajni objekat sa širokim spektrom hidrauličnih komponenti i opreme, ručni razvodnici, pumpe, zvona, spojnice, nivostati, rezervoari, ventili, el.mag.razvodnici, priključci, filteri, ulošci filtera, držači cevi i još mnogo toga u vašem ORLIKONU HIDRAULIKA!

•    Custom CNC Machining

•    24/7 Emergency repair service

The TALOS STEEL facility is 10,000 square feet in area and 30 feet high, featuring a complete range of specialized machining equipment (lathes, milling machinery, boring mills and drill presses.) Our largest lathe has the ability of turning up to 30 feet in length and has a double bed in order to accommodate larger circumferences. Our boring mill has a universal attachment for vertical and horizontal machine work on oversized items, and our drill press can adjust to work on parts that are 20 feet in diameter.

There is a dedicated welding section that further complements our machine shop, and we have a 20 ton overhead crane that is able to run the entire length of the shop floor for convenient transport access for all parts and materials to our machines.

The TALOS STEEL facility is well equipped to handle large items (frames, buckets and shafts) for applications in construction, mining and other heavy industries. We also have an array of medium to smaller sizes of equipment available for your tasks that don’t require large machine work.

 Bei MillStep glauben wir an das Konzept des Mehrwerts für unsere Kunden.  Mit einem Netzwerk von Kunden und Partnern in ganz Europa setzen wir unsere Technologie und Expertise ein, um unseren Kunden zu helfen, ihre Produktionsprozesse zu optimieren und ihre Wettbewerbsfähigkeit zu stärken, ohne dabei ihr Budget zu strapazieren.

 Möchten Sie mehr darüber erfahren, wie unsere CNC-Fräsmaschinen und Sondermaschinen Ihr Unternehmen unterstützen können, ohne Ihr Budget zu belasten? Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute für eine persönliche Beratung!

1.Metal stamping dies, metal stamping parts' production, automotive dies, home appliances stamping dies, sheet metal parts, stamping tool, punching mould, metal mold, stamping dies, metal stampings

3.Checking fixtures, gauges, checking jigs, inspection tool.
4.Welding fixtures, welding jigs, bonding fixture, arc welding, spot weld fixtures, robot welding fixtures.

Established in 1981 from the business idea of two brothers thanks to their passion for mechanics, Meccanica Segrino can be considered a worldwide leading manufacturer of monolithic insulating joints for gas, water and other fluids.
Insulation joints provide electrical isolation and cathodic protection in pipeline, tanks and pumping station where petroleum, gas and water are carrier fluid. They serve as a positive leak proof long lasting block against the flow of electrical current in all piping systems regardless of the application.
The monolithic insulating joints manufactured by Meccanica Segrino are available for service line and for main line applications in many diameters and different class of pressure (ANSI 150, ANSI 300, ANSI 400, ANSI 600). The insulation joints are designed, manufactured and tested internally using state of the art machinery in order to guarantee the best quality. Manufacturing facilities are located in Italy and are ISO 9001:2008 certified with extensive quality control procedures to ensure compliance with product performance and reliability standards. The monolithic insulating joints produced by Meccanica Segrino are sold all over the world both directly and through local distributors.
As the founders say: "We are strongly convinced that in the field of monolithic insulating joints it’s important to be specialized in order to provide product quality, timely delivery and flexibility, the key success factors to be successful! We pursue these values in order to satisfy our customers of standard insulating joints, made to stock and available on the shelf, as well as of our custom insulating joints, designed and manufactured to meet special customer requirements. Our customer portfolio is made of over 70% loyal customers who have been purchasing our insulating joints for more than 20 years. This is the most important indicator of the quality we provide every day!"

Teknozone 2007 yılında İzmir’de faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Firmamız İzmir Torbalı’da bulunan 2000 m2 kapalı alana sahip üretim tesisinde, ozon jeneratörü üretimi, projelendirilmesi ve servis hizmetleri ile sektöründe lider firma konumundadır.

Firmamız aynı zamanda EUOTA’ya ( European Ozone Trade Association ) ve IOA’ya ( International Ozone Association ) üyeliği kabul edilen ilk ve tek Türk ozon jeneratörü üreticisi olmanın haklı gururunu yaşamaktadır.

2020 yılında firma aynı kalite politikası ile TEKNOLAZER Sac işleme tesisini kurmuş olup, bünyesinde CNC Lazer kesim, büküm, kaynak, konstrüksiyon imalatı ve elektrostatik toz boyama tesisini kurmuştur.

Tesiste Girdi, Proses ve Final olmak üzere 3 kalite adımında üretim gerçekleşmekte olup, yalın üretim süreçlerinden 5S ve Kaizen adımları kusursuz uygulanmaktadır.

Sac işleme tesisinde farklı zamanlarda paslanmaz çelik, siyah malzeme, alüminyum işlenmektedir.

Kadro yapısında Makine Mühendisi, Malzeme ve Metalurji Mühendisi, Endüstri Mühendisi ve Teknik Ressamı ile özel proses imalatı ya da hazır işlemleri kalite standartlarında gerçekleştirmektedir.

Name: Mazandaran Steel Industries (MSI)
Description:
Mazandaran Steel Company was established in 1980 with the objective of manufacturing various types of steel casting components in the city of Sari, situated in the Mazandaran province of Iran. The Primary field of activity of  Mazandaran Steel Industries Company is associated with the production of various consumable casting parts used in mining industries, particularly in the sectors of stone crushers(Including all the steel consumption parts used in Impact Crusher, Cone Crusher and Jaw Crushers), cement, and consumable parts for large mines. Although the compony possesses years of experience in manufacturing various casting parts and is equipped with state-of-the-art technical facilities, it is also capable of reverse engineering and producing various custom orders of casting parts.
Mazandaran Steel Industries has so far succeeded in exporting its parts directly to the Czech Republic, Sweden and Uzbekistan, as well as the products of this company indirectly to the countries of Azerbaijan, Tajikistan, Iraq and Kazakhstan.

Name: Amiad GmbH - Machining Fluid Filtration
Description:
Amiad filtration solutions are designed to remove particulates, chips, and other contaminants from the fluid to ensure a consistent and reliable cutting process. The technology is available in a range of sizes and configurations to suit inner cooling and flood cooling equipment for different cutting fluids, including synthetic, semi-synthetic, and water-based variants.

Our team of experts will work closely with you to understand your unique requirements and develop customized coolant filtration systems that seamlessly integrate with your setup, ensuring a flawless fit to your production process – turning, milling, drilling, boring, grinding, honing, or lapping.

Contact us today to discover how Amiad’s Machining Fluid Filtration systems can optimize your machining performance and productivity. Experience the perfect harmony of efficient production with our cutting-edge machine tool coolant filtration systems.

Name: Ravnsgaard Metal A/S
Description:
Ravnsgaard Metal A/S is a full-service machining and metal processing company specializing in milling, turning, welding, and assembly. 

The company is the result of a merger between six companies within the metal industry. While not all elements of the original businesses were carried forward, the strongest and most capable units have been consolidated at our two sites in Randers and Herning, Denmark.

The Herning site, formerly Ravnsgaard Smede- og Maskinværksted A/S, employs approximately 50 people. It is a versatile blacksmith workshop specializing in sheet and pipe processing, traditional metalwork, and welding in stainless steel, aluminum, and black iron. A fleet of well-equipped vans and small trucks supports on-site assembly, service, and industrial maintenance. The site also includes a dedicated machine shop focusing on the machining of small components in both metal and plastic materials.

The Randers site, formerly Kurt Sørensens Maskinfabrik A/S, has around 70 employees and is specialized in the machining and processing of very large components—up to 20 tons. It also features a smaller blacksmith workshop and a fleet of well-equipped service vans. Randers is particularly strong in precision measurement, housing a large and advanced 3D measurement center capable of handling components up to 4 x 3 x 2 meters.

Ravnsgaard Engineering, drawing on expertise from both locations, employs about 15 specialists. The unit provides engineering, design, and project management services in areas where we hold deep experience—such as welding (including EN1090 compliance), machining, and support for prototypes and low-volume (0-series) production.

Name: Capital Tool Industries
Description:
Capital Tool Industries (CTI) has manufactured precision gear-cutting tools since 1966. We serve global OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers across automotive, aerospace, power transmission and heavy machinery with high-precision gear hobs, shaper cutters, power-skiving cutters and specialised finishing tools. Our engineering-first approach combines legacy craftsmanship with modern manufacturing to deliver repeatable accuracy, long tool life and measurable productivity gains.

In recent years CTI has accelerated its international growth through strategic acquisitions — extending our product range, deepening technical expertise and improving customer proximity in Europe. In March 2023 we acquired Belgium-based Mico Tools (Mishalle NV), enhancing our power-skiving and gear-shaper capability.  ￼ In September 2025 we completed the acquisition of Acedes Gear Tools (UK), further strengthening CTI’s European footprint and advanced tooling portfolio.  ￼

CTI today offers:
	•	Complete portfolio of gear-cutting solutions (hobs, shaper cutters, skiving cutters, chamfer and finishing tools).  ￼
	•	Local sales & support in Europe through integrated teams and retained local customer service.  ￼
	•	Global manufacturing with centralized quality systems and investments in process automation to ensure consistent delivery for export customers.

Our vision: combine global scale with specialist tooling know-how so customers can produce quieter, stronger and more efficient gearsets — faster and at lower cost.

Name: METAL for America
Description:
Supported by the Department of War and led by the brightest minds in the industry, METAL (Metallurgical Engineering Trades Apprenticeships & Learning) is on a mission to empower the next generation of innovators and builders in casting and forging.

We’re not just preparing for the future – we’re forging it.

METAL is led by IACMI – the Composites Institute and supported by the Department of Defense’s IBAS program.

We envision a future where the U.S. casting and forging industry thrives with a skilled and robust workforce, securing our nation’s defense industrial base. By accelerating the development of a highly-skilled, adaptive workforce, METAL (Metallurgical Engineering Trades Apprenticeship & Learning) is unleashing the transformative power of technology and innovation to revitalize American manufacturing.

At its core, METAL embodies a philosophy of boundless possibility. It dares to envision a future where the fusion of cutting-edge training, continuous learning, and audacious thinking can solve even the most complex challenges facing our nation. From the heart of American industry to the frontiers of space exploration, METAL is creating a new generation of metallurgical professionals ready to shape the 21st century.

The U.S. casting and forging industry faces a pressing workforce shortage, threatening the stability of our defense supply chain. By 2028, we need an additional 122,000 skilled professionals, including skilled trades, engineers, and other critical roles. Our dependency on foreign sources for essential materials poses a significant risk to our national security. METAL is our answer to this challenge, providing the necessary training and education to build a self-sustaining workforce.

Name: VALAM
Description:
La historia de Valam S.A.I.C. comenzó en el año 1963, con su instalación en un taller metalúrgico en la ciudad de Wilde, Provincia de Buenos Aires, donde fabricó su línea de Válvulas a Diafragma “NEVALIC”, marca reconocida por la industria argentina en esa época.

En 1968 se acordó una licencia de fabricación con la empresa inglesa SAUNDERS VALVE COMPANY, trayendo a la Argentina una marca reconocida mundialmente, junto con la experiencia en desarrollo y avance tecnológico de esa empresa, líder en su especialidad.

A partir de comienzos del año 2001, VALAM comienza a fabricar exclusivamente con la marca VALAM luego de cancelar la licencia con la empresa Saunders Valve Company.

Construyendo sobre esa base de conocimiento, y apoyado por la experiencia propia adquirida en más de 40 años de fabricación y desarrollo, VALAM es hoy líder en su rubro específico de válvulas a diafragma y especialista en válvulas mariposa, de retención, de equilibrio, y otros productos que ofrecemos, brindando un nivel de excelencia en asesoramiento técnico y servicio a la industria.

Su moderna planta de 3000 metros cuadrados, su depósito con un amplio stock de productos, y su equipo de personal altamente capacitado, están a su disposición para satisfacer todas sus necesidades.

We are wire forming experts with a passion for providing great wire forming machines that solve customer problems. Our solution will be customized to your specific needs with an unmatched accountability to the results you seek.
How we do it:
We design and fabricate our machines at our 31,000 SQ Ft facility in Downers Grove, IL.  Our in-house engineering staff develops new wire forming machines and software designs as well as tooling and other customizations. Robotic integration with secondary processes are a core capability. The majority of our fabrication processes are performed in-house, reducing dependence on suppliers and providing flexibility and responsiveness.

Name: SA3 - SPONGE JET
Description:
SA3 est le distributeur exclusif de Sponge Jet pour la France

Sponge Jet est le précédé de décapage à sec et sans poussière qui consiste à projeter sous pression des médias (éponges en polyuréthane) contre les surfaces à traiter (Substrats acier, béton, bois...)

Nous avons un choix de plus de 16 médias avec différents abrasifs (Oxyde de fer, oxyde d’aluminium, polycarbonate de calcium, bille de verre, ou encore sans abrasif) ainsi que différentes granulométries pour obtenir une préparation de vos surfaces de 0µm à +/- 100µm avec un degré de soin allant jusqu’à SA3.

Les avantages du Sponge jet sont multiples :
- 90% de poussière en moins au premier jet ce qui augmente nettement la visibilité de décapage
- Réduction des coûts des abrasifs en les recyclant entre 3 et 10 fois par le tamisage des éponges afin des les séparer des contaminants et / ou des déchets potentiellement nocifs.
- 7 fois moins de déchets que le sable traditionnel (recyclage des éponges)
- 90% de rebond en moins car il est absorbée par l’éponge, pression de décapage entre 2.5 et 7 bars ce qui permet le travail en coactivité (possibilité de ramasser les éponges pour les tamiser en même temps que l’opération de décapage)
- Unités de projection et tamis séparateur disponible en 100% pneumatique pour permettre une décontamination totale en milieu pollué (Plomb et / ou amiante)
- Préparation de surface de haute qualité (de 0µm à 100µm) avec degré de soin allant jusqu'a SA3
- 2 technologies de décapage, en jet libre avec les équipements SA3 ou Sponge Jet ou en rattrapage à la source car SA3 est également distributeur pour la France de Pinovo.

Rendez vous sur notre site Web : www.sa3.fr

Name: CASTOFOAM INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Lost foam casting, also named as evaporative pattern casting(EPC), is known as the green casting technology in twenty first due to its high dimensional accuracy, smooth surface and low pollution these advantages. Lost foam casting technology (EPC or LFC) is to use foam plastic to make a solid shape that is exactly the same as the part structure and size. It is dipped and coated with refractory bonding paint, dried and then molded with dry sand, vibrated and compacted, and then poured The molten metal vaporizes and disappears the pattern by heating, and obtains a casting method for metal parts with the same shape as the pattern. Lost foam casting is a new technology with nearly no margin and precise forming. It does not need to close the box to take the mold, and uses binder-free dry sand to reduce pollution. 
The production of lost foam casting moulding line is generally divided into three sections: "white area", "yellow area" and "black area". The "white area" is the pattern part, the main production equipment is: pre-foaming machine, molding machine, cutting machine, bonding machine, etc. The "yellow area" is the paint coating and drying part, the main production equipment is: paint preparation machine, paint mixer, pattern dip coating machine, pattern drying room, etc.The "black zone" is the moulding system, the pouring system, the sand reclamation system, and the casting shot blasting system. The main production equipment includes: moulding vibrating table, moulding box, vacuum negative pressure system, melting and pouring equipment, hydraulic turnover machine, used sand cooling and reclamation system, casting shot blasting equipment, etc.
2. Technical Specifications
Technical parameters.png
3. Application
Automotive industry, locomotive industry, construction machinery, machine tools, Mining machinery, cement machinery,  sanitary ware industry, etc.

Misura Teknoloji olarak, alüminyum işleme makineleri ve CNC tezgahları üretiminde sektörde öncü bir firmayız. Gelişmiş üretim altyapımız ve modern kalite kontrol süreçlerimizle, uluslararası standartlara uygun, yüksek performanslı ve dayanıklı ürünler sunuyoruz.

Üretim süreçlerimizde, geleneksel mühendislik uzmanlığını en ileri teknolojiyle birleştiriyoruz. Bu sayede, sektörde güvenilirlik ve uzun ömürlülük konularında referans kabul edilen makinelerle, müşteri odaklı yenilikçi çözümler geliştiriyor ve sektördeki standartları yeniden tanımlıyoruz.

Yüksek kaliteli ve son teknoloji makinelerimiz ile müşterilerimizin operasyonel verimliliğini artırmayı hedefliyoruz. Sektördeki konumumuzu, küresel satış ağımız ve alanında uzman ekibimizle dünya çapında sunduğumuz kapsamlı hizmetlerle pekiştiriyoruz.

Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutuyor, satış sonrası destek hizmetlerimizle fark yaratıyoruz. 7/24 sağladığımız uzaktan bağlantı ve yerinde servis hizmetlerimizle, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına hızla yanıt veriyor ve işletme süreçlerinin kesintisiz devamlılığını sağlıyoruz.

Misura Teknoloji olarak, endüstriyel makine teknolojilerinde öncü rolümüzü koruyarak, küresel ölçekte kalıcı bir etki yaratmayı ve sektördeki konumumuzu sürekli olarak güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

As a family-owned medium-sized company with a production facility in Germany, Weber Präzisionstechnik is dedicated to maintaining high-quality standards. This approach enables us to stay ahead of the curve and guarantees the sustainability of our work.

Our flexibility and high availability ensure a continuous production process. Our equipment lineup just got a major upgrade: we’ve added five new INDEX Multi-Spindle CNC machines, dramatically increasing our capacity and giving us world-class throughput for complex, repeatable components. These machines allow us to compete aggressively on cost, volume, and lead time — even on parts traditionally run on cam-driven screw machines.

We operate a growing fleet of CNC Swiss lathes and state-of-the-art INDEX Multi-Spindle machines, giving us rare versatility in producing intricate parts at scale, with industry-leading consistency.

Our value-added services include:

Engineering collaboration & design-for-manufacture

Secondary operations & assembly support

PPAP & compliance documentation

Direct mill sourcing for material cost advantage

At DW Products, we focus on reliability, precision, and long-term partnerships. If you're looking for a supplier that can scale with your needs and deliver with confidence — let’s talk.

Name: Waydart Machine Tools
Description:
Automatic deburring tools, back face, counterbore, countersink, and nano-technology ceramic fiber brushes are being introduced to the Indian market with an innovative UX tool holder featuring a hydraulic mechanism that ingeniously uses the machine’s coolant liquid. This system delivers exceptional control over insert movement.
1. UBURR
Revolutionary automatic deburring tools featuring precision-engineered cutting blades with innovative geometry, complemented by our MT DURASHIELD advanced tool-holders. UBURR represents the perfect fusion of efficiency and precision in automated deburring processes.
2. UBACK
The Ultimate Back line brings together the innovative UX tool-holders and USPOT/UCHAMF inserts to redefine machining precision. Featuring a patented hydraulic mechanism that ingeniously uses the machine’s coolant liquid, this system delivers exceptional control over insert movement. The result is Unparalleled accuracy, repeatability, and streamlined operations for back counterboring, back countersinking, and back spot-facing tasks.
With its advanced engineering, Ultimate Back eliminates the need for workpiece rotation, effortlessly performing operations in a single pass while significantly boosting productivity and efficiency.
3. UFIBER

Name: Beyza Metal
Description:
İnce Detaylar, Güçlü Performans: Alüminyum Enjeksiyonunda Lider!
Firmamız 1978 yılında Sayın Cengiz Kaya tarafından İstanbul Bostancı’da kurulmuştur. Beyza Metal, üretimine küçük bir atölyede kokil döküm ile başlamış ve kısa bir süre sonra, 1980 yılında özellikle beyaz eşya sektöründe müşteri ve pazar taleplerini karşılamak amacıyla ilk yüksek basınçlı döküm makinası yatırımını yapmıştır.

80’li yılların başında Beyza Metal gelişmeye devam ederek İstanbul Zeytinburnu’ndaki bir sonraki tesisine taşındı ve 1990 yılında kendi kalıp imalathanesini kurdu.

Yeni projelerin değerlendirilmesi ve artan pazar taleplerini karşılamak amacıyla 1996 yılında aydınlatma, mobilya, beyaz eşya ve otomotiv sektörlerinden farklı ürünlerin üretimine başladığımız İkitelli OSB tesisimize taşındık. 2000’li yılların başında daha yüksek tonaj kapasitesine sahip sıcak ve soğuk yüksek basınçlı döküm makineleri yatırıma başladık.

Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak amacıyla 2010 yılında IS0 9001:2008 Kalite Yönetimi Sistemi sertifikamızı alarak kalite kontrol laboratuvarımızı da kurduk.

Ve 2020 yılında Tekirdağ’da 5.000 m2 üzerine kurulu Velimeşe tesisimizin inşaatına başladık.

Şirket politikamız; müşterilerimize doğru yerde, doğru zamanda, güvenilir hizmet sunmak ve mümkün olan en kaliteli ürünü en rekabetçi fiyata üretmektir.

Name: Eagle Lasers France
Description:
EAGLE LASERS est une entreprise leader dans la recherche, le développement et la production de systèmes de découpe laser à fibre.

En combinant une puissance élevée, une accélération jusqu'à 6G et une technologie de découpe de pointe, les clients d'Eagle bénéficient d'une efficacité maximale à des coûts de production réduits. 

Notre philosophie repose sur le concept de "machine idéale", développé après des années de recherche et d'analyse : une traverse en fibre de carbone, des moteurs linéaires sur tous les axes, une tête de découpe brevetée "eVa", les sources de puissance les plus élevées du marché et un changement de palette en seulement 9 secondes garantissent une solution dynamique et performante qui minimise les temps d'arrêt.

L'innovation étant inscrite dans son ADN, Eagle a été la première entreprise à introduire des sources de puissance de 8 kW, 10 kW, 12 kW, 20 kW et 30 kW. Outre les systèmes de coupe, nous proposons des solutions d'automatisation et des logiciels brevetés. 

Eagle garantit un service avant-vente complet, avec l'étude de la meilleure solution, et après-vente, avec un service sur tout le territoire.

Name: Liquid Cooling Plate Factory
Description:
The heat to be dissipated is fastened to the surface of the liquid cooling plate. The inside of the liquid cooling plate is a flow channel structure with inlets and outlets, and is connected to the external liquid cooling pump circulation system through pipes. The heat absorbed by the liquid cooling plate is brought to an external heat dissipation device with a larger area and stronger performance through the circulation of the liquid for centralized heat dissipation. The cooled liquid flows back to the liquid cooling plate again to take away excess heat.

Name: SM Wire Steel

Name: Ferramentaria Pickler
Description:
Desenvolvemos moldes de alta precisão para extrusão de perfis termoplásticos, com foco em soluções sob medida que moldam o futuro da indústria de transformação plástica.

Nosso compromisso com a inovação, qualidade e desempenho industrial se reflete em cada projeto. Por meio de uma abordagem personalizada e de tecnologia avançada, oferecemos soluções técnicas específicas para as necessidades de cada cliente.

Cada molde é uma oportunidade de aplicar nossa experiência em engenharia, garantindo eficiência, consistência produtiva e acabamento de alta qualidade. Trabalhamos incansavelmente para entregar ferramentas que não apenas atendem, mas superam as expectativas em durabilidade, produtividade e estabilidade dimensional.

 Especialização em moldes para extrusão de PVC e outros termoplásticos. A Ferramentaria Pickler é especializada no desenvolvimento de moldes para extrusão de perfis de PVC, além de atuar com:
•	PP (polipropileno)
•	PE (polietileno)
•	PC (policarbonato)
•	PS (poliestireno)
•	ABS
•	PET
•	Coextrudados e biextrudados
•	Perfis com alma metálica e materiais especiais

Atendemos uma ampla gama de aplicações, com soluções técnicas para setores como construção civil, comunicação visual, automotivo, refrigeração, mobiliário e acabamentos.

Cada molde de extrusão é cuidadosamente ajustado para atender às especificações técnicas do cliente. Oferecemos um processo completo de try-out interno, com testes rigorosos em nossa estrutura de laboratório para simular as condições reais de produção.
Durante os testes, realizamos os ajustes necessários para garantir ótimo desempenho, estabilidade dimensional e facilidade de operação em linha.
Quando necessário, também oferecemos try-out nas instalações do cliente, assegurando que o molde esteja pronto para operação em larga escala, com confiabilidade e produtividade desde o primeiro uso.

Atentos a las necesidades del mercado, ofrecemos ollaos duraderos y versátiles, adecuados para una amplia gama de aplicaciones, y nos distinguimos por nuestra capacidad de innovar y personalizar. Nuestra eficiencia operativa, combinada con una excelente relación calidad-precio, nos permite cumplir con las exigencias de nuestros clientes manteniendo los más altos estándares de calidad. Además, nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad y la responsabilidad ambiental refleja nuestra dedicación no solo a la excelencia en manufactura, sino también al bienestar de nuestro planeta.

Name: PRAXIS Tools
Description:
PRAXIS Tools - Bochori Nikolaos & Co. OE, established in 1978, specializes in tools and industrial supplies in Greece, becoming a reliable supplier of high-quality industrial equipment. Its reputation is built on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

Initially a sole proprietorship in Thessaloniki, founder Panagiotis Papadopoulos expanded PRAXIS Tools to serve Northern Greece. The company adapted to new technologies and market demands, expanding its product and service range. In 1996, it was renamed Papadopoulos Panagiotis & Co. OE, continuing under the brand name MENTOR. In 2021, it became PRAXIS Tools - Bochori Nikolaos & Co. OE, aligning its identity with future goals and symbolizing its commitment to innovation, quality, and customer focus.

PRAXIS Tools' success is bolstered by partnerships with leading manufacturers like Sandvik Coromant, KASTO, and PFERD, ensuring a diverse range of high-quality products. The company's commitment to quality extends to all operations, with products thoroughly inspected and ISO 9001 certified since 2021.

Beyond sales, PRAXIS Tools offers technical support, training, and consulting. Its experts provide solutions and support, ensuring customers maximize product value. Training programs educate customers on proper use and maintenance, while consulting services offer tailored advice for selecting suitable products.

Innovation is central to PRAXIS Tools' philosophy. Continuous investment in new technologies and process improvements keeps the company at the industry's forefront. PRAXIS Tools focuses on effective experience management, building strong relationships, continuous development, and leveraging new technologies.

Customer satisfaction is paramount, with a focus on quality, reliability, and personalized service. PRAXIS Tools values customer feedback and offers comprehensive after-sales support, ensuring long-term reliability and customer loyalty. This customer-centric approach is key to the company's success.

Name: National Metalwares
Description:
National Metalwares, L.P., is a customer driven, high volume manufacturer, fabricator and finisher of welded steel tubing and tubular components meeting the exacting requirements of consumer and industrial product manufacturers. We offer specialized, value added services that differentiate us from our competitors and use innovative approaches in all phases of production. Our complete vertical integration has given us a competitive advantage for over 60 years.

In fact, this total in-house capability allows many of our customers to minimize their own inventories.

We have three tube mills capable of creating a wide range of shapes and sizes. All mills are monitored using statistical process controls for exact diameter and length requirements.

Name: UCOR - Troqueles y mecanizado
Description:
En UCOR diseñamos, fabricamos y realizamos mantenimiento de troqueles. Estamos especializados en troqueles progresivos y de precisión, así como troqueles de doble efecto. Además del diseño y fabricación de moldes y utillajes. También realizamos mecanizado convencional y de alta precisión. Fabricamos y modificamos piezas, series cortas y largas.

Basados en la mejora continua como uno de nuestros principales objetivos cada año, contamos con un parque de máquinas actual equipado con la última tecnología y herramientas de última generación.

Utillajes de Corella SA, UCOR se constituyó en al año 2003 en la localidad navarra de Corella. La experiencia previa de 30 años en la fabricación y montaje de moldes y troqueles y el afán por crecer profesionalmente y ofrecer soluciones a la demanda del mercado, impulsó la creación de esta empresa.

Contamos con un departamento propio de ingeniería e I+D formado por profesionales con dilatada experiencia en el sector. Para el diseño, se parte de plano pieza o indicaciones del cliente. En su defecto, se podría partir de muestra de pieza. El diseño es la clave del proyecto, por ello es importante que durante este proceso exista una comunicación continua con el cliente hasta conseguir el diseño que se busca para la posterior fabricación. 

Nuestros técnicos asesoran al cliente y buscan la mejor solución que se adapte a sus necesidades. Para el desarrollo del diseño se utilizan programas CAD y CAM en 2D y 3D (Autocad Mechanical, NX Siemens 12 y NX 1926, Solid Work, Feature Cam Ultimate).

Nuestro equipo está formado por profesionales cualificados y con amplia experiencia de más de 15 años en sus correspondientes puestos de trabajo lo que les convierte en técnicos especialistas. Somos una empresa joven y flexible que se adapta en todo momento a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Ekibimiz, yılların deneyimi ve bilgi birikimi ile, sanayi ve üretim alanında müşterilerimize en uygun çözümleri sunmak için bir araya gelmiştir.

Müşterilerimize sunduğumuz çözümler, yüksek kalite standartlarına sahip olup, performans ve dayanıklılığı ön planda tutmaktadır. Her projeye özel, ihtiyaca yönelik çözümler sunarak, iş süreçlerini optimize etmeyi ve verimliliği artırmayı hedefliyoruz.

Portline Makina olarak, sadece makine üretmekle kalmıyor, aynı zamanda satış sonrası hizmetlerimizle de müşterilerimizin yanında olmaya devam ediyoruz. Uzman teknik destek ekibimiz, ihtiyaç duyduğunuz her an size yardımcı olmak için hazırdır.

Güvenilir, yenilikçi ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla, sektörde fark yaratmaya ve müşteri memnuniyetini sağlamaya devam edeceğiz. Portline Makina, makine sektöründeki çözüm ortağınız olmaktan gurur duyar.

Name: Sanpa Elektrikli Malzemeler Ltd.
Description:
SANPA LTD. ŞTİ.
Şirketimiz 1994 senesinde kurulmuştur. Faaliyetimizin ilk yıllarındaki çalışma Türkiye’deki çeşitli imalat sektörlerine yönelik endüstriyel ürünlerin (elektrik motorları, motoredüktörler, vanalar, pompalar, enkoderler, sürücüler vs) distribütörülüğü ile başlamıştır. Aynı yıllarda faaliyet alanımıza Türkiye’deki demir çelik sektöründeki firmalara yönelik yüksek kapasiteli, hassas, hızlı ve üretken makine imalatı yapan italyan firmalarının temsilcilikleri eklenmiştir. Distribütörlük faaliyetimiz motoredüktörler ve enkoderler ile devam etmektedir.
Makine temsilcilik faaliyetimiz kapsamında çalıştığımız İtalyan makine firmalarının her biri kendi alanında lider, sektörlerinde tanınmış, güvenilir, tecrübeli ve saygın firmalardır.
Türkiye’nin çok çeşitli bölgelerinde farklı sektörlerde imalat yapan sanayicilerle daha yüksek üretkenliğe sahip, ağır hizmet koşullarında ve yüksek tempoda çalışabilecek, güvenli, kullanıcı dostu makinelerimizi buluşturmaktayız. Bu makineler için kurulum, devreye alma, eğitim, teknik destek, bakım, yedek parça, taşıma gibi hizmetleri sağlamak üzere kurulmuş ve uzman teknisyenlerden meydana gelmiş servis departmanımız ile kesintisiz hizmet sunmaktayız.
Otomotiv, mobilya, beyaz eşya, iklimlendirme, inşaat, çelik konstrüksiyon, ticari araçlar, tarım makineleri, havacılık, endüstriyel tesisat, endüstriyel mutfak, ev gereçleri vb hizmet verdiğimiz başlıca sektörlerdir.
Sanpa olarak amacımız tüm müşterilerimize en iyi, en hızlı, en kaliteli ve en uygun koşullarda hizmet vermektir. Türkiye’nin sürekli gelişen ekonomisine sağladığımız teknolojik katkıyı daha ileri seviyelere taşımak, ürünlerimizin bilinirliğini arttırmak ve daha fazla müşteriye ulaşmak için var gücümüzle çalışıyoruz.

Próximamente, estaremos en la Patagonia, ampliando nuestra cobertura en el sur de Argentina.
Nuestros Servicios:
Venta y reparación de bombas de agua de marcas líderes como Grundfos, Flygt y KSB.
Bobinado de motores y reparación integral de equipos.
Fabricación y mantenimiento de sellos mecánicos y juntas rotativas, cumpliendo con los más altos estándares de calidad.
Con presencia en toda Argentina y el Mercosur, trabajamos codo a codo con empresas e industrias que buscan soluciones confiables, personalizadas y duraderas.

¿Qué nos hace diferentes?
Servicio profesional y adaptado: Entendemos las necesidades únicas de cada cliente, ofreciendo un enfoque B2B eficiente y especializado.
Compromiso con la calidad: Cada proyecto refleja nuestro esfuerzo por garantizar soluciones de larga vida útil y máxima eficiencia operativa.
Cobertura regional: Desde Argentina hacia toda América Latina, brindamos soporte técnico y comercial en cualquier punto donde se nos necesite.
Si tu empresa necesita un socio confiable para la venta, reparación o fabricación de bombas de agua y sellos mecánicos, estamos aquí para ayudarte. Nuestro equipo de expertos está listo para transformar tus desafíos en soluciones de alto rendimiento.

Contamos con recursos humanos especializados, como así también recursos físicos adecuados y tecnología moderna.

Hace unos años, y con el objeto de brindar una atención integral a nuestros clientes, decidimos expandir nuestros servicios hacia el rubro de maquinarias para la industria y el agro. Nuestros productos se destacan por una significativa participación en el mercado agrícola nacional e internacional debido a su elevado grado de tecnología, eficiencia, productividad, calidad de trabajo y durabilidad.

Dichas características nos llevaron a recorrer distintas exposiciones y ferias nacionales e internacionales como la Farm Progress Show en Estados Unidos y el Agrishow en Brasil. Actualmente exportamos a distintos países como Uruguay, Venezuela, India, Estados Unidos, Sudafrica y Zambia.

Es necesario destacar que nuestros técnicos y profesionales de vasta trayectoria trabajan constantemente en actualizaciones para estar al día con los avances de la agricultura y poder seguir concretando esta armonía que es nuestro presente.

Com expertise e tecnologia, a Becotec se posiciona como referência na valorização de resíduos sólidos, contribuindo para um futuro mais limpo e sustentável.

Name: DMR Metal Boru
Description:
DMR METAL İŞLEME LTD. ŞTİ., 2008 yılında kurulmuş olup soğuk çekme boru imalatı, boru kesme–boy tamamlama ,form verme , uç şekillendirme ve boru talaşlı imalat alanlarında uzmanlaşmış, entegre çözümler sunan bir üretim firmasıdır. Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana; teknik bilgi birikimimiz, modern makine parkurumuz ve deneyimli ekibimizle, yüksek hassasiyet gerektiren boru ve işleme ihtiyaçlarını güvenilir, hızlı ve kaliteli şekilde karşılamayı hedefliyoruz.
Başta otomotiv ve tarım sektörü olmak üzere; makine imalatı, savunma sanayi, hidrolik–pnömatik sistemler, mobilya-metal konstrüksiyon, ısıtma–soğutma sistemleri, enerji ekipmanları ve genel endüstriyel uygulamalar için standart ve özel ölçülerde boru ürünleri ile boru işleme çözümleri sunuyoruz. Sektör çeşitliliğiyle elde ettiğimiz geniş deneyim, müşterilerimizin farklı teknik taleplerine esnek ve hızlı şekilde cevap verebilmemizi sağlamaktadır.
Üretim kabiliyetlerimiz; soğuk çekme boru üretimi, kesme,boy tamamlama  bükme, delme, şekillendirme ve CNC talaşlı imalat süreçlerinin tamamını kapsayan güçlü bir yapıya sahiptir. Bu entegre yapı sayesinde, ihtiyaca özel çözümleri tek çatı altında sunarak zaman, maliyet ve kalite avantajı sağlıyoruz. Tüm üretim süreçlerimizde kalite kontrol, izlenebilirlik ve proses standartlarına titizlikle uyuyor; müşteri memnuniyetini süreç yönetiminin merkezinde tutuyoruz.

With a rapid response to emergency breakdowns, and fast turnaround of on-site & off-site repairs, we keep unplanned shutdown to a minimum.
