From product and tool design to forging, heat treatment, and machining, everything is carried out within our integrated factory, positioning Huatuchang as a one-stop supply point. Leading electric vehicle companies in China, such as DJI, Yadi, and Foxconn, trust us to provide them with high-quality precision forging parts.

In 2015, we set up a 1,600-ton hot forging production line to cater to the growing demand for aluminum alloy components in new energy vehicles. Today, we proudly serve as a tier 2 supplier, delivering metal accessories to renowned companies like BMW, Mercedes-Benz, and BYD.

Since 2009, we have harnessed our engineering expertise in metal forming, forging design, and machining, establishing a dedicated research and development center for hot forging in China. Through continuous investment and modern laboratory and testing facilities, Huatuchang has emerged as one of China's leading forging companies, boasting advanced quality assurance technology and ISO 9001 and IATF16949 certifications.

Name: BS CNC-Workshop Kft
Description:
Cégemet 2013-ban alapítottam magánvállalkozásként. Telephelyünk Kecskemét központi ipari részén található, ahol közel 900 m2-es csarnokunkban jelenleg 3 CNC esztergával, 4 CNC marógéppel és 1 hagyományos palástköszörű géppel dolgozunk. 2020 évétől a már meglévő minőségbiztosítási részlegünket a mai elvárásoknak megfelelő mérő szobával korszerűsítettük. Itt klimatizált környezetben megtalálható koordináta mérőgép, lineáris magasságmérő, felület érdességmérő és beszerzés alatt lévő optikai mérőgép kapott helyett.

Cégünk 13 nagy tapasztalattal rendelkező kollégát foglalkoztat, CNC forgácsoló, CNC esztergályos, lakatos, programozó illetve minőségbiztosítási szakember munkakörben.

Már az indulási évben bevezetésre került az EN ISO 9001:2015 minőségbiztosítási rendszer, melyet minden évben megújítunk. Az évek során folyamatos bővülésre és fejlődésre tettünk szert melynek köszönhetően több nagy multicégnek lettünk fő beszállítói. Fő tevékenységi körünk az egyedi, kis és közepes szériák, precíziós alkatrészek valamint készülékek gyártása.

Üzletpolitikánk, az általunk előállított termékek vevői rész felőli maximális elégedettsége, a határidők, és a legmagasabb szintű minőség betartásával.

Description:

The company operates with cutting and bending machines capable of handling 6000 mm in length and 15 mm in thickness, as well as CNC laser cutting machines that can cut up to 50 mm thick sheets with dimensions of 12000 x 3000 mm. Name: SJK Industries
Description:
SJK Machine was started in 1998 from a garage with 1 manual mill and limited tools. Steve had strong knowledge in the machining and automation industry and strived to succeed. At that time, only very simple and small quantity machining of parts was all that could be accomplished. Throughout the next couple of years, that 1 manual mill turned into 1 CNC mill, 1 CNC lathe, and a welder. At that point was the start of custom automated machines for various companies in the plastic industry. 



Although it was tough to get there, this is when success was on the horizon. For years, Custom Engineered Machine continued to work with different industries to provide all aspects of custom fabrication and machines. 



Fast forward to 2020, Custom Engineered Machine purchased McGuire Machine and SJK Machine was established. We Now strive to complete highly complex precision parts, machines, fabrications, and prototypes for an extremely wide range of industries. We work with Aerospace, Department of Defense, Automotive, Oil and Gas, Medical and Electronics are only a few of the industries we provide engineering and products for nationwide. We do this in a state-of-the-art, 30,000-square-foot facility consisting of multiple CNC Lathes, Vertical mills, Horizontal mills, Waterjet, and Wire EDM’s.

تولید محصولات آلومینیومی داری المانهای فنی و ظرافتهای خاص می باشند. متاسفانه عدم درک متقابل تولید کننده و مصرف کننده منجر به روابط غیر شفاف و عدم هماهنگی و در نتیجه باعث اتلاف زمان ، سرمایه و سوء تفاهم بین آنها می شود.
شرکت آلوم طرح پاسارگاد در سال 1387 به ثبت رسمی رسیده و از سال 1389 آغاز به فعالیت در زمینه مهندسی فروش آلومینیوم نموده است. در این راستا، این شرکت با بهره گیری از نیروهای متخصص، باتجربه و تحصیل کرده به ویژه در صنایع و علوم مرتبط با صنعت آلومینیوم و حسابداری صنعتی، با همکاری افراد خوش نام و صاحب سبک در صنعت آلومینیوم تلاش زیادی بر کاهش اتلاف انرژی داشته که این نکته کاهش قیمت تمام شده محصول تولیدی را به دنبال خواهد داشت. 
نوع فعالیت در این عرصه به گونه ای است که تیم مهندسی فروش به منظور افزایش کیفیت محصول نهایی و کاهش قیمت تمام شده ، ایفای نقش میکند.
هم چنین تیم طراحی مقاطع پروفیل و مجموعه های پروفیلی با استفاده از نرم افزارهای طراحی و نقشه کشی آنچه را که در اندیشه مشتریان است با ابتکار ، مهارت و خلاقیت به محصول تبدیل می کند. این پروسه تا مرز شبیه سازی خروجی مقطع از قالب با استفاده از نرم افزارهای 3D و روشهای نوین مهندسی همزمان در چارچوب این شرکت به عنوان اولین و تنها شرکت ابداع کننده این روش در ایران پیش می رود.

Melting Capability

We are capable of producing high-quality titanium ingots such as GR, GR1, GR2, GR9, GR23. Our annual melting capacity exceeds 5,000 tons. We strictly adhere to international standards such as ASTM B348 and AMS 4928. Our capabilities cover the full spectrum of machining:

CNC Turning – large-diameter and long-length parts, complex geometries, API 6A components

CNC Milling – 3-axis and 5-axis precision milling for complex features and pocketing

Horizontal Boring – heavy equipment parts, base plates, and complex castings

Precision Honing – controlled bore finishes and exacting surface quality for hydraulic and downhole tools

Manual Machining – custom one-off parts, repair work, and prototypes

We support a wide range of materials including Inconel, Hastelloy, Monel, 17-4PH, 4140, and stainless alloys, giving operators and OEMs the confidence that their parts will meet the demands of corrosive, high-pressure, and high-temperature service environments.

Inspection and Quality

ISO 9001:2015 certified QA/QC

±0.0005" tolerances achievable

100% CMM inspection available

Full traceability and material certs upon request

Industries Served

Whether you need quick-turn prototypes, long-run production, or repair machining, B&R Productions is equipped to deliver.

• Higher stamping accuracy

• Reduced downtime and rework

Nossos produtos exclusivos representam a vanguarda da inovação, impulsionando a eficiência e a rentabilidade para nossos clientes em todo o Brasil e além-fronteiras, atendendo também a demandas em países da América do Sul. Tapetes aquecidos, aquecedores elétricos e outras soluções patenteadas são testemunhos do nosso compromisso com a excelência e a liderança no mercado.

Localizada estrategicamente em Franca, São Paulo, embora não seja o epicentro da suinocultura, nossa base operacional floresce em um ambiente industrial dinâmico, aproveitando os recursos abundantes que a cidade oferece para impulsionar nossa missão de proporcionar inovação e eficiência aos nossos clientes.

Na Fzardo, não apenas seguimos o ritmo da indústria - lideramos o caminho, definindo novos padrões e moldando o futuro do setor. Somos mais do que uma empresa; somos pioneiros, impulsionados pela visão de transformar desafios em oportunidades e obstáculos em triunfos. Junte-se a nós nesta jornada rumo à excelência.

Name: Fujian Meifu Technology Co., LTD
Description:
Fujian Meifu Technology Co., Ltd. was established in Fujian Province of China in 2020. Its magnesium alloy industrial park has a total investment of about RMB 240 million. Our magnesium-based materials and products cover the applications in oil-and-gas tools, rail transit, aerospace, 3C Electronics and other fields. Adhering to the greener, lower-carbon and higher-efficiency initiatives, Fujian Meifu has built a full life-cycle manufacturing process, including raw material melting and casting, extrusion/rolling, machining, surface treatment and waste recycling. 

Since the establishment, Fujian Meifu has always embraced the mindset of the importance in research and development for new technology and innovation. So far, it has successfully developed more than 20 advanced dissolvable magnesium alloy grades for oil and gas application. The company was rewarded with a dozen of Chinese and international patents. We exerted our effort to expand the application portfolio of Mg alloys, thanks to the unique properties of Mg alloys. One of the dissolvable magnesium alloys possesses a very high ductility, which was successfully used to replace the degradable rubber as seal elements. Also, the research of some high-strength grades, some high-temperature resistant grades, some high-ductility grades, and grades with customized dissolvability have led to the great technical breakthroughs to the whole industry. With the innovative formation and process developments, Fujian Meifu continues to expand the product portfolio in both dissolvable grades and standard/non-dissolvable grades. We take great advantage of our full life-cycle production to speed up the R&D of the advanced materials and their manufacturing in a cost-efficient way. We also take the advantage of the nature of lighter and greener materials from magnesium alloys to expand their applications using both dissolvable and non-dissolvable/standard grades. Some of grades have broken the world records in terms of ductility,

Name: COFAHE Argentina
Description:
A principios de los 80, se establece la primera Sociedad de Hecho y se comenzó con la fabricación de herramientas para caños bajo marca CFH. Al año ya estábamos fabricando el primer equipo desobstructor, inspirado en modelos provenientes de los EE. UU. 
Surge equipo C-300 con una producción a pequeña escala, pero ingresando fuertemente y con gran aceptación al mercado sanitario, con ese modelo.
Siendo pioneros en la fabricación de estos equipos en el país y con buenas ventas, nos vimos obligado a crecer.
El mercado, ante un producto nuevo y novedoso para la época, comenzó a demandar y exigirnos más producción y variedades de modelos para distintas necesidades de trabajos.
Esto nos significó, agrandar nuestros talleres de producción y embarcarnos en un ambicioso plan de ampliación y modernización.
Así surge en el año 1982 la sociedad que hoy conocemos como T.I.M.H.E. S.R.L. y se registra nuestra marca COFAHE.
Contando con galpones, maquinaria propia y capacidad técnica, se comienza rápidamente con la preparación de matricería y dispositivos para la producción de nuestros nuevos modelos para la desobstruccion y rastreo de cañerías. De esta forma surgen los modelos rotativos y mecánicos, que son utilizados actualmente a lo largo y ancho del país.
Luego comenzamos con el diseño y fabricación de los equipos tipo Hidro-Jet. Estos utilizan la acción de chorros de agua a alta presión para el mantenimiento y desobstruccion de redes cloacales y pluviales. Siendo estos los modelos del tipo COFAHE HJ, los hay de distintas potencias y tamaños. Para uso domiciliario y hasta los de mayor porte para los trabajos en redes Municipales.
Con pocos, pero muy buenos distribuidores, manejamos el mercado Nacional en el cual podemos decir con orgullo que nuestro nombre y marca son sinónimo de calidad y durabilidad, siendo además nuestra atención postventa reconocida por nuestros clientes.

NIKOV spol. s r.o. was founded on 11.02.1992. At the beginning, the company's production activities were oriented on manufacturing fixtures and precise parts for domestic customers. Name: placon by Metallbau Schiffler
Description:
Was sind die Vorteile der placon Glasklemme?
Mit diesen flexiblen Plattenhaltern können individuelle Lösungen problemlos realisiert werden. Die placon Glasklemme kann auf jeden Winkel frei eingestellt werden. Jede Glasscheibe wird so spannungsfrei eingebaut. Glas-Geländer benötigen keine Eckpfosten mehr und erhalten mit der placon Glasklemme eine elegante Lösung. Die placon Glasklemme ist aus Edelstahl gefertigt. Sie ist bestens für Außenbereich geeignet, etwa für Balkone oder Terrassen. Ebenso verleiht sie Wendeltreppen im Innenbereich eine schwebende Schwerelosigkeit. Ergänzend zu der flexiblen Lösung haben wir starre Glasklemmen sowie Sicherungsstifte und das entsprechende Zubehör in unserem Programm.

Wer profitiert von unserer innovativen Glasklemme?
Handwerksbetriebe: Sie können mit dieser Glasklemme jeden Winkel, von 85º bis 185º, einstellen.
Architektur-Büros: Sie finden für jedes Geländer eine elegante Lösung. Die Glasklemme bietet Ihnen zudem Möglichkeiten, die Sie vorher in dieser Form nicht hatten.
Werften: Die placon Glasklemme ist aus V4A-Edelstahl konstruiert und somit korrisions- und säurebeständig. Sie ist ausdrücklich für den Einbau von Geländern auf Schiffen oder Booten geeignet, da sie Salzwasser abweisend und unempfindlich gegenüber Rost ist. Auch bei starkem Wind oder Sturm bietet die placon Glasklemme den benötigten Halt!

Kontaktieren Sie uns unter: info@placon-bau.de
Oder telefonisch unter: +4993 24 – 97 89 090

¿Quiénes somos?
Talleres Faustino G.G., S.L. es una empresa situada en Avilés con una larga experiencia en el campo de la mecanización y calderería que permite atender eficazmente las necesidades que la industria demanda en cada momento, tanto a nivel de fabricación de piezas según plano o muestra, como de reparación de componentes o maquinaria.

Valores como el servicio al cliente, la seguridad de nuestros empleados, así como también el aseguramiento de la calidad, la proporcionalidad y la formación continua para la mejora e innovación de los procesos productivos son nuestra enseña de identidad como empresa.

Contamos con más de 50 años de experiencia ofreciendo el mejor servicio y destacando por nuestra seriedad y profesionalidad en nuestros trabajos.

Nuestras instalaciones cuentan con más de 750 m2 que nos facilitan la realización de trabajos de máxima calidad en un espacio óptimo y organizado para el desempeño de nuestras tareas.

Somos conscientes de la necesidad de conservar el medio ambiente e integrarse en el entorno que nos rodea por lo que manifestamos nuestra voluntad de prevenir y minimizar los impactos ambientales derivados de nuestra actividad y nos comprometemos a cumplir con la normativa legal exigible y a establecer y revisar un sistema de mejora continua, de acuerdo con las nuevas tecnologías, de acuerdo con las nuevas tecnologías que estén a nuestro alcance.

Es por ello que Talleres Faustino colabora con GESTINER, empresa autorizada por el Gobierno del Principado de Asturias para la gestión ecológica integral de residuos.

Benefícios Garantidos:

Customized Solutions:
Understanding that each sugar mill has its specific requirements, we pride ourselves on providing customized solutions. Our engineering expertise allows us to tailor machinery to your exact specifications, ensuring seamless integration into your production processes.

What Sets Us Apart:

Decades of Experience:
With over 45 years of hands-on experience, Samarth Engineering Works brings unparalleled expertise to the table. Our seasoned professionals have successfully completed numerous projects, earning us a reputation for reliability and excellence.

Proven Track Record:
Our portfolio boasts a diverse range of successful projects undertaken for leading players in the sugar industry. From small-scale operations to large, industrial facilities, we have consistently delivered superior machinery solutions that stand the test of time.

Name: Vosonn Press Brake Tooling
Description:
Dear colleagues, business partners. First of all, I would like to thank to all our employees, distributors who set many years of friendship and cooperation with us, representatives and suppliers on behalf of VOSONN Family for their amazing contributions and strengthening us in the world market and getting us among the top five producers in China.

Our company is a family business with 21 years of experience in producing tools for press brakes and guillotine knives. 

We offer standard tools with Amada Promecam, Trumpf/Wila, and LVD holding systems. Punches and dies produced by us are compatible with many other edge presses such as Durma, Ermaksan, Baykal, EHT, Haco, LVD, Safan, and many others.

We also offer customized tool production services, including special punches and dies according to your design. Our team of experts is capable of assisting in the selection and design of tools, tailoring them to the end product. We manufacture tools from improved, hardened materials up to 6000 mm in length. All of our tools are hardened and ground to ensure the highest quality and durability. 

In addition to bending tools, we also offer guillotine shear knives , allowing for cutting of sheets with a maximum thickness of 3mm to 25 mm. We also manufacture knives to order according to customer drawings.We also offer quick clamps and crowning system.

Since 2018, we have also been offering laser-hardened tools and the renovation of tools used in conjunction with laser re-hardening. 

Our company is known for the quality of our products and excellent customer service.Become the world\'s most reliable leading brand by continuous growth, and to provide sustainability as the 1st choice of the customers with the product and service quality. We invite you to contact us.

Name: Ruian Yongjiu Standard Component Factory
Description: Ruian Yongjiu Standard Component Factory, a leading professional manufacturer of spring washers and flat washers in China with over 50 years of expertise. We are the only manufacturer in China that applies advanced laser cutting technology to spring washer production, setting a new standard for the industry. Compared with traditional processing methods, our laser-cut spring washers have the following advantages: (1) unparalleled precision — dimensional tolerance is strictly controlled within an ultra-small range. (2) Ensuring consistent incision size across every single washer. (3)The cutting surface is extraordinarily smooth without any burrs, eliminating potential assembly troubles. (4) Furthermore, our advanced laser cutting technology guarantees perfect opening alignment with no overlap, and the one-time pass rate of finished products reaches an astonishing 100%. This exclusive technology not only elevates product performance to a higher level but also greatly enhances production efficiency, enabling us to deliver high-quality orders faster than our peers.we excel at customizing spring washers. Whether you need specific sizes (from M1.0 to M30), various materials (carbon steel, stainless steel, phosphor bronze, etc.), special materials for extreme environments (high temperature, corrosion resistance, etc.), unique surface treatments (galvanization, passivation, nickel plating, copper plating, etc.), or even non-standard size, our R&D team – with an average of 30 years of experience – can turn your ideas into reality in as fast as 2 working days. Name: Meccanica Segrino srl
Description:
Established in 1981 from the business idea of two brothers thanks to their passion for mechanics, Meccanica Segrino can be considered a worldwide leading manufacturer of monolithic insulating joints for gas, water and other fluids.
Insulation joints provide electrical isolation and cathodic protection in pipeline, tanks and pumping station where petroleum, gas and water are carrier fluid. They serve as a positive leak proof long lasting block against the flow of electrical current in all piping systems regardless of the application.
The monolithic insulating joints manufactured by Meccanica Segrino are available for service line and for main line applications in many diameters and different class of pressure (ANSI 150, ANSI 300, ANSI 400, ANSI 600). The insulation joints are designed, manufactured and tested internally using state of the art machinery in order to guarantee the best quality. Manufacturing facilities are located in Italy and are ISO 9001:2008 certified with extensive quality control procedures to ensure compliance with product performance and reliability standards. The monolithic insulating joints produced by Meccanica Segrino are sold all over the world both directly and through local distributors.
As the founders say: "We are strongly convinced that in the field of monolithic insulating joints it’s important to be specialized in order to provide product quality, timely delivery and flexibility, the key success factors to be successful! We pursue these values in order to satisfy our customers of standard insulating joints, made to stock and available on the shelf, as well as of our custom insulating joints, designed and manufactured to meet special customer requirements. Our customer portfolio is made of over 70% loyal customers who have been purchasing our insulating joints for more than 20 years. This is the most important indicator of the quality we provide every day!"

Name: Foshan IntTrust Precious Metal Material Co ., Ltd .
Description:
Founded in 1994, Foshan IntTrust Precious Metal Material Co Ltd is located in Guangdong Foshan, China.  Our company specializes in the development and manufacturing of metal parts and electrical contacts for various industries and applications. Our production floor sized over 80,000 sq ft, and with a team of 150 employees, we are able to manufacture over 2 billion units of metal parts annually.  Our company is ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified and we strive to deliver high quality components to meet all of our customers needs and expectations worldwide. 
        Our stamping department currently has a wide combination of metal press equipment ranged from 5 tons to up to 130 tons. This grants us the ability to produce stamping parts with different types of metals such as steel, copper, silver, stainless steel, and aluminum, with thickness range from 0.05 milometers to 2.5 milometers. This is our tooling workshop. Our tooling equipment gives us the ability to design and develop our own moulds and tools to better serve our clients needs. 
        Our head riveting department is capable of producing all types of silver based electrical contacts. The silver contact is the core component that determines the life and durability for all controllers and switches. With over a hundred riveting machines, we're currently capable of manufacturing over 2000 types bi-metal, tri-metal, and solid silver contacts to meet all our customers' requirements. Our contacts are widely applied in industries such as micro switches, thermostats & thermal protectors, circuit breakers, elevator switches and relays etc. 
       To further enhance our customers' satisfactions, we also provide additional assembly services that our clients may find convenient for them to purchase semi-finished products from us. We can develop automated assembly lines such as automated brazing and welding, automated rivetting and even plastic injection can all be developed in house to help improving.

Name: HeliUP Handling Wheels
Description:
We began our activities in 2012 with the repair of machining, hydraulic, and mechanical maintenance services for various industry sectors. From 2015 onwards, we began offering specialized maintenance services for hydraulic and mechanical handling wheels. Since then, we have carried out maintenance on dozens of these pieces of equipment.
HeliUP is a specialist in handling wheels maintenance and we have developed our own line of spare components to replace equipment that no longer had support from the original manufacturers.
Responding to a demand from customers and friends who faced unfavourable situations regarding availability, accessibility, practicality and safety in their daily operations, we developed and manufactured a new concept of mechanical handling wheels, adding safety and practicality of operation. Our product was developed to meet a demand from customers who have H125 model helicopters (previously designated the AS350 B3e); however, we can customize them to be compatible with other aircraft.
In these years of existence, we have accumulated experience and cultivated a network of friends and satisfied customers, creating a community of people passionate about what we do. The accessories we offer serve the purpose of improving the quality of life of pilots and mechanics, adding agility and ease to their daily tasks.
The challenges of this mission have been rewarding and we remain excited to pursue new project ideas, generating increasingly practical and safe solutions and sharing them with the helicopter enthusiast community.

Description:
Fundada no Estado do Rio de janeiro, na cidade de Volta Redonda, a JETDAMP nasceu de uma necessidade de inovação do mercado de jateamento e preparação de superfícies. Assim buscou no mercado nacional soluções inovadoras aliadas à tecnologias que visam a qualidade e eficiência aliadas a segurança e preservação do meio ambiente. Em parceria com a empresa VBJATEADORAS encontrou
equipamentos de alta tecnologia que entregam a melhor performance e rendimento do mercado nacional e internacional em
tratamento de superfícies.
A JETDAMP conta com profissionais altamente qualificados, com experiência consolidada no mercado.
Nosso corpo técnico é composto com profissionais com mais de 35 anos de experiência na área de caldeiraria e montagem industrial, além de profissionais com formação técnica e engenharia.
O sistema utilizado pela JETDAMP para limpeza e preparação de superfícies é denominado “amigo do meio ambiente e do colaborador”, pois utiliza abrasivos inertes que não prejudicam o meio ambiente, não produzem poeiras e não trazem nenhum risco de acidentes e nem à saúde do colaborador durante a operação. O sistema úmido em baixa pressão, corresponde às necessidades dos clientes em diversas aplicações. Estudando e entendendo os muitos desafios da indústria e da prestação de serviços para limpeza, recuperação e preparação de superfícies para aplicação dos mais diversos revestimentos e da exigência dos órgãos ambientais e de segurança do trabalho, objetivamos os nossos serviços de forma ecologicamente correta, segura e que atendam as exigências do mercado, aliando isso a qualidade, produtividade e rentabilidade.

Description:
Losma fue fundada en 1981 como un pequeño taller de calderería por parte de dos jóvenes en Terrassa, en un momento en que la industria metalúrgica vallesana completaba un período de expansión que comenzó en los años 60. 

Con el paso los años, fruto de la constancia y el trabajo duro, el negocio fue creciendo, hasta convertirse en un referente del sector en la ciudad.

Dieciocho años después de su fundación, en 1999, decidimos hacer una inversión en tecnología, adquiriendo el primer equipo láser de corte. Este hecho nos permitió producir nuestra propia materia prima, para luego ofrecer el servicio al público, hasta el punto de convertirse en nuestra principal actividad, adquiriendo más equipos de corte láser a medida que la demanda ha ido creciendo.

En la actualidad, somos capaces de ofrecer una amplísima experiencia en trabajos de chapistería, así como un servicio de corte láser de la máxima calidad.

El futuro pasa pues por mejorar día a día en todos los servicios, siempre con la satisfacción de nuestros clientes como objetivo principal

Name: American Foundry Society Mid-Atlantic Chapter
Description:
The Mid-Atlantic Chapter of the American Foundry Society (AFS) is dedicated to advancing the foundry industry through education, innovation, and community engagement. Serving professionals and businesses in the Mid-Atlantic region, we strive to be a leading resource for technical expertise, industry trends, and networking opportunities.

Our Mission
Our mission is to promote the growth and development of the foundry industry by providing valuable resources, fostering collaboration, and supporting continuous learning. We aim to empower our members with the knowledge and skills needed to excel in a rapidly evolving industry.

What We Do
Education and Training: We offer a range of educational programs, workshops, and seminars to enhance the technical skills and knowledge of our members. Our goal is to keep professionals abreast of the latest advancements and best practices in the foundry industry.

Networking Opportunities: We host events throughout the year, including our signature crab feasts, technical conferences, and industry meetups, providing members with the opportunity to connect, share ideas, and build lasting professional relationships.

Join Us
Becoming a member of the Mid-Atlantic Chapter of the American Foundry Society means being part of a vibrant community dedicated to the advancement of the foundry industry. Whether you are a seasoned professional or new to the field, our chapter offers something for everyone. Join us in our mission to shape the future of the foundry industry.

Contact Us
For more information about our chapter, upcoming events, or membership opportunities, please visit our website or contact us directly.

Proaden, 2020’de Bursa’da, alanlarındaki tecrübeleri 25 yılı aşan mühendisler tarafından kurulan, sac işleme makineleri ve robotik sistemler üzerinde uzmanlaşmış, sektöründe hızla yükselen bir mühendislik firmasıdır.

Endüstri 4.0’la sanayinin olmazsa olmazları arasına giren robotik sistemlerin kısa zamanda tüm sanayi kollarına yayılacağından ve ülkemiz endüstrisinin uluslararası standartlara erişeceğinden şüphemiz yok. Bu süreçte sanayicilerimizin yanında güvenilir bir yardımcı olarak bulunmaktan ve birlikte geleceği inşa etmekten mutluluk duyuyoruz.
İleri teknoloji ile donatılmış üretim tesislerinde ve her biri kendi alanında uzman mühendislerin bilgi birikimi ile kaliteli makine ve robotik sistemleri uygun fiyatlarla sanayicilerimizle buluşturuyor, AR-GE çalışmalarımızla sizlere daha verimli bir hizmet sunabilmek için kendimizi ve sac işleme sektörümüzü geliştirmeye çalışıyoruz.
Sektörel beklentilerinizi son teknoloji çözümlerle karşılamak için profesyonel ekiplerimiz ile daima yanınızdayız. Proaden kalitesiyle tesisinizi geleceğe hazırlamak, firmanıza özel tasarlanmış çözümlere ulaşmak ve teklifler almak için şimdi bizimle iletişime geçin!

Name: PengFu Precision
Description:
At PengFu Precision, we specialize in precision machining, extrusion pins, custom punches, standard and special pins, steel & carbide tooling, and wire & RAM EDM machining.

Founded in 1999, PengFu Precision began as a stamping specialist in Shenzhen, providing innovative tooling solutions for both domestic and international customers.

In 2015, our Tooling Design Department became an independent division, expanding our capabilities in precision machining, mold parts, and custom tooling.

By 2019, we established state-of-the-art production facilities in Dongguan, enabling us to manufacture high-quality tooling, machine parts, and fastener solutions for a wide range of industries.

With decades of experience, we deliver high-quality cold forming tools, press tools, and mold parts, tailored to meet our customers’ exact specifications. Our expertise allows us to manufacture DIN9861 standard components, Torx tooling, and ejector pins with precision and reliability.

We streamline every stage of production to ensure efficiency and quality. Through continuous improvements in our facilities, equipment, and processes, we enhance our capabilities to meet the highest industry standards.

Name: Duomi (Guangdong) Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd.
Description:
Duomi (Guangdong) Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer of CNC drilling and tapping machines, focusing on the design, production and sales of CNC drilling and tapping machines. Our main business products include: CNC friction drilling and tapping machines, CNC drilling and tapping machines, multi-spindle drilling and tapping machines, four-axis drilling and tapping machines, five-axis drilling and tapping machines, small micro hole precision high-speed drilling machines, small micro hole multi-spindle precision drilling machines, etc.
They are widely used in aerospace, rail transportation, automobile, medical, communication, electrical, mold, mechanical parts and other industries. All our machine tools have been tested and compensated for accuracy by API laser interferometers. The repeat positioning accuracy of all models is guaranteed to be 0.01mm, and all have passed CE certification. At present, it has become the first in the Chinese industry in the drilling and tapping segment. The CNC machines we produce are exported to more than 10 countries including Italy, Canada, Germany, the United States, Russia, France, Turkey, the United Arab Emirates, South Korea, Vietnam, Singapore, Malaysia, etc.
We can provide free professional design solutions and design more efficient and high-precision CNC drilling and tapping machine solutions according to customer needs. We can also provide free proofing services, and our strong after-sales service team can provide on-site installation, commissioning and training according to customer needs.

Description:
En Talleres APedro López, nos especializamos en la reparación y mantenimiento de vehículos industriales, brindando un servicio técnico de alta calidad y precisión. Contamos con una amplia experiencia en la mecánica de camiones y remolques, asegurando soluciones eficientes y duraderas para el óptimo rendimiento de tu flota.

Nuestro equipo altamente capacitado trabaja con distintos tipos de vehículos industriales, incluyendo hormigoneras, cisternas de cemento, bañeras, tauliner y plantas de hormigón. Aplicamos las mejores prácticas del sector para garantizar el funcionamiento seguro y eficiente de cada equipo, minimizando tiempos de inactividad y maximizando la productividad de nuestros clientes.

Además, ofrecemos un servicio especializado de soldadura en hierro y aluminio, ideal para reparaciones estructurales y refuerzos en carrocerías, chasis y otros componentes metálicos. Utilizamos técnicas avanzadas que garantizan acabados resistentes y duraderos, prolongando la vida útil de los vehículos y evitando fallos prematuros.

También nos destacamos en la venta y reparación de compresores para productos pulverulentos, asegurando su correcto funcionamiento y optimizando la eficiencia en el transporte y descarga de materiales.

En Talleres APedro López, trabajamos con profesionalismo, compromiso y un alto estándar de calidad. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecerte soluciones confiables y personalizadas para mantener tu flota en óptimas condiciones. Confía en nosotros, la seguridad y el rendimiento de tus vehículos están en buenas manos!

Weldec to jedyny w Polsce producent urządzeń i elektrolitów do czyszczenia i polerowania spoin spawalniczych. Coraz nowsze technologie pozwalają czyścić spoiny szybko, efektywnie, bez śladów chemicznych, opłacalnie i w sposób przyjazny dla środowiska. Jest to alternatywa dla toksycznych past trawiących i pasywujących, oraz dla wszystkich metod mechanicznych. Nasze urządzenia pozwalają przywrócić elementom spawanym ich naturalny wygląd oraz zabezpieczyć je przed korozją poprzez proces pasywacji. 

Laboratoryjne doprecyzowanie parametrów  pozwoliło stworzyć technologię wyprzedzającą dotychczasowe metody czyszczenia spoin spawalniczych.

Ta opatentowana technologia znalazła uznanie w Zakładzie Technik Spajania Politechniki Warszawskiej, gdzie dla studentów zostało stworzone specjalne laboratorium, w którym prowadzone są ćwiczenia z czyszczenia i polerowania spoin, oraz pomiary własności powierzchni obrabianych, oraz na kursie IWE dla spawalników na Politechnice Warszawskiej.

All the products have passed ISO9001,SGS certification and have reached world leading level.

Our aluminum sheet products have strong competitive advantages in application of ship plate, oil tanker, and storage barrel products.
